abstract: Training Large Language Models (LLMs) is highly memory-intensive due to optimizer state overhead. The FRUGAL framework mitigates this with gradient splitting, but its static hyperparameters -- the subspace ratio ($ρ$) and update frequency ($T$) -- require costly manual tuning, limiting adaptability. We present AdaFRUGAL, which automates this process by introducing two dynamic controls: (i) a linear decay for $ρ$ to progressively reduce memory, and (ii) a loss-aware schedule for $T$ to lower computational overhead. Experiments across large-scale pre-training (English C4, Vietnamese VietVault) and fine-tuning (GLUE) demonstrate that AdaFRUGAL achieves a compelling trade-off. It maintains competitive performance against AdamW and static FRUGAL while significantly reducing both GPU memory and training time, offering a more practical, autonomous solution for resource-constrained LLM training.
comment: We have identified issues in the current version of the manuscript that may affect the validity of some results. We are withdrawing the paper to conduct further verification and improvements before resubmission

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应动态控制方法AdaFRUGAL，自动调整子空间比和更新频率，降低LLM训练内存和计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练大型语言模型时，优化器状态的内存开销巨大。FRUGAL框架通过梯度分裂缓解该问题，但其静态超参数（子空间比ρ和更新频率T）需要昂贵的手动调优，缺乏适应性。这限制了FRUGAL在不同任务和资源条件下的实际应用，亟需一种自动化的动态控制机制来平衡内存、计算效率和模型性能。
light_analysis.method: AdaFRUGAL引入两个动态控制策略：（i）对ρ采用线性衰减，逐步减少子空间维度以降低内存占用；（ii）基于损失函数自适应调度T，在训练稳定时降低更新频率以减少计算开销。方法适用于大规模预训练和微调，无需手动调参，实现了内存与效率的自动权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在英文C4、越南语VietVault的预训练和GLUE微调上，AdaFRUGAL与AdamW和静态FRUGAL相比，在保持竞争性性能的同时，显著降低了GPU内存消耗和训练时间。内存节省和速度提升的具体数值取决于配置，实验证实其在不同场景下均能实现更优的资源利用。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaFRUGAL通过自动化动态控制，解决了FRUGAL的静态超参数调优难题，为资源受限环境下的LLM训练提供了一种自主、高效的解决方案。其贡献在于将内存优化与自适应调度结合，未来可探索更复杂的衰减策略或扩展到其他优化器变体。

title: The devil is in the details: Enhancing Video Virtual Try-On via Keyframe-Driven Details Injection
abstract: Although diffusion transformer (DiT)-based video virtual try-on (VVT) has made significant progress in synthesizing realistic videos, existing methods still struggle to capture fine-grained garment dynamics and preserve background integrity across video frames. They also incur high computational costs due to additional interaction modules introduced into DiTs, while the limited scale and quality of existing public datasets also restrict model generalization and effective training. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework, KeyTailor, along with a large-scale, high-definition dataset, ViT-HD. The core idea of KeyTailor is a keyframe-driven details injection strategy, motivated by the fact that keyframes inherently contain both foreground dynamics and background consistency. Specifically, KeyTailor adopts an instruction-guided keyframe sampling strategy to filter informative frames from the input video. Subsequently,two tailored keyframe-driven modules, the garment details enhancement module and the collaborative background optimization module, are employed to distill garment dynamics into garment-related latents and to optimize the integrity of background latents, both guided by keyframes.These enriched details are then injected into standard DiT blocks together with pose, mask, and noise latents, enabling efficient and realistic try-on video synthesis. This design ensures consistency without explicitly modifying the DiT architecture, while simultaneously avoiding additional complexity. In addition, our dataset ViT-HD comprises 15, 070 high-quality video samples at a resolution of 810*1080, covering diverse garments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that KeyTailor outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in terms of garment fidelity and background integrity across both dynamic and static scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出关键帧驱动的细节注入框架KeyTailor和大规模高清数据集ViT-HD，提升视频虚拟试穿的服装细节和背景一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散Transformer的视频虚拟试穿方法难以捕捉细粒度服装动态并保持背景完整性，同时引入额外交互模块导致高计算成本，且数据集规模和质量有限。这些问题限制了模型泛化能力和训练效果，亟需高效且一致的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: KeyTailor采用指令引导的关键帧采样策略筛选信息帧，随后通过服装细节增强模块和协同背景优化模块，基于关键帧分别提炼服装动态和优化背景潜在表示，再将细节注入标准DiT块，结合姿态、掩码和噪声潜在实现高效合成。该方法无需修改DiT架构即可保持一致性，避免额外复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在ViT-HD数据集（15,070个810×1080高清视频样本）上，KeyTailor在动态和静态场景下均优于现有基线，在服装保真度和背景完整性方面达到最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: KeyTailor通过关键帧驱动策略解决了视频虚拟试穿中的细节和背景问题，同时保持计算效率。ViT-HD数据集为领域提供了大规模高质量资源。未来可扩展至更复杂的动态场景。

title: Efficient Zero-Shot Inpainting with Decoupled Diffusion Guidance
abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful priors for image editing tasks such as inpainting and local modification, where the objective is to generate realistic content that remains consistent with observed regions. In particular, zero-shot approaches that leverage a pretrained diffusion model, without any retraining, have been shown to achieve highly effective reconstructions. However, state-of-the-art zero-shot methods typically rely on a sequence of surrogate likelihood functions, whose scores are used as proxies for the ideal score. This procedure however requires vector-Jacobian products through the denoiser at every reverse step, introducing significant memory and runtime overhead. To address this issue, we propose a new likelihood surrogate that yields simple and efficient to sample Gaussian posterior transitions, sidestepping the backpropagation through the denoiser network. Our extensive experiments show that our method achieves strong observation consistency compared with fine-tuned baselines and produces coherent, high-quality reconstructions, all while significantly reducing inference cost. Code is available at https://github.com/YazidJanati/ding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效的零样本图像修复方法，通过解耦扩散引导避免反向传播，降低内存和计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本扩散模型修复方法依赖于代理似然函数的分数近似，每次反向步骤都需要计算向量-雅可比乘积，导致显著的内存和运行时开销。为了解决这一效率瓶颈，本文旨在设计一个更简单的似然代理，实现高效采样。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个新的似然代理函数，用于引导高斯后验过渡采样，从而避免通过去噪器网络的反向传播。该方法直接利用预训练扩散模型，无需重新训练或微调，通过解耦引导机制实现高效零样本修复。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法与微调基线相比达到了强观察一致性，生成连贯、高质量的修复结果，同时显著降低了推理成本。具体性能指标提升摘要未明确说明，但强调效率改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过解耦扩散引导解决了零样本修复中的计算瓶颈，实现了高效且高质量的图像修复。该工作具有实际应用价值，代码已开源，未来可进一步探索引导机制的优化。

title: Consist-Retinex: One-Step Noise-Emphasized Consistency Training Accelerates High-Quality Retinex Enhancement
abstract: Retinex-based low-light image enhancement benefits from separating reflectance and illumination, yet recent generative approaches often rely on iterative sampling and are difficult to deploy under strict latency budgets. Consistency models offer a natural route to one-step restoration, but direct adaptation to Retinex-factorized enhancement is unstable: one-step inference is evaluated at the high-noise endpoint, whereas standard training schedules provide little supervision there, and temporal self-consistency alone does not determine the correct conditional target. We propose Consist-Retinex, which first uses a Retinex Transformer Decomposition Network (TDN) to obtain paired reflectance and illumination maps, then trains two conditional consistency models with a Retinex-aware dual objective and adaptive noise-emphasized fixed-point sampling. The dual objective combines trajectory consistency with paired ground-truth component alignment, while the sampling rule concentrates supervision near the inference endpoint without discarding full-range noise coverage. We further provide an endpoint error bound, an anchoring-propagation result, and a high-noise sample-allocation analysis that explain why endpoint supervision and temporal consistency are complementary for one-step Retinex enhancement. Experiments on paired and unpaired low-light benchmarks show that Consist-Retinex obtains the best VE-LOL-L scores among the compared methods under one-step inference and remains competitive on LOL, with substantially reduced sampling and consistency-stage training cost in the reported setup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Consist-Retinex，通过噪声强调的一致性训练与 Retinex 分解，实现一步式低光图像增强，显著加速推理并提升质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于 Retinex 的低光增强方法受益于分离反射和光照，但现有生成式方法依赖迭代采样，难以在严格延迟预算下部署。一致性模型可一步恢复，但直接适配 Retinex 分解不稳定：一步推理在高噪声端点评估，而标准训练在此处监督不足，且时序自一致性无法确定正确条件目标。因此需要一种稳定的训练策略，兼顾端点监督与全局噪声覆盖。
light_analysis.method: 首先使用 Retinex Transformer 分解网络 (TDN) 获取成对的反射和光照图，然后训练两个条件一致性模型，采用 Retinex 感知双目标：轨迹一致性与真值分量对齐。自适应噪声强调定点采样集中监督推理端点，同时保留全范围噪声覆盖。理论分析给出端点误差界、锚定传播和高噪声样本分配，解释端点监督与时序一致性的互补作用。
light_analysis.result: 在成对和不成对低光基准上，Consist-Retinex 在一步推理下取得最佳 VE-LOL-L 分数，在 LOL 基准上保持竞争力。相比其他方法，采样和一致性阶段训练成本大幅降低，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为 Retinex 增强提供了一步式高效解决方案，通过噪声强调一致性训练克服了直接适配的稳定性问题。理论分析支撑了方法有效性，实验验证了质量与速度的平衡。未来可探索更复杂的分解架构或扩展到其他图像恢复任务。

title: Value-Guided Iterative Refinement and the DIQ-H Benchmark for Evaluating VLM Robustness
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are essential for embodied AI and safety-critical applications, such as robotics and autonomous systems. However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on static or curated visual inputs, neglecting the challenges posed by adversarial conditions, value misalignment, and error propagation in continuous deployment. Current benchmarks either overlook the impact of real-world perturbations, or fail to account for the cumulative effect of inconsistent reasoning over time. To address these gaps, we introduce the Degraded Image Quality Leading to Hallucinations (DIQ-H) benchmark, the first to evaluate VLMs under adversarial visual conditions in continuous sequences. DIQ-H simulates real-world stressors including motion blur, sensor noise, and compression artifacts, and measures how these corruptions lead to persistent errors and misaligned outputs across time. The benchmark explicitly models error propagation and its long-term value consistency. To enhance scalability and reduce costs for safety-critical evaluation, we propose the Value-Guided Iterative Refinement (VIR) framework, which automates the generation of high-quality, ethically aligned ground truth annotations. VGIR leverages lightweight VLMs to detect and refine value misalignment, improving accuracy from 72.2% to 83.3%, representing a 15.3% relative improvement. The DIQ-H benchmark and VGIR framework provide a robust platform for embodied AI safety assessment, revealing vulnerabilities in error recovery, ethical consistency, and temporal value alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DIQ-H基准和VGIR框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在对抗性视觉条件下的鲁棒性和价值对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要关注静态或精心策划的视觉输入，忽视了真实世界中的对抗条件、价值错配和连续部署中的错误传播。DLQ-H基准填补了这一空白，模拟运动模糊、传感器噪声和压缩伪影等真实应激源，并测量这些失真如何导致持续错误和输出价值偏移。
light_analysis.method: DIQ-H基准通过引入连续序列中的对抗性视觉条件来评估VLM，并显式建模错误传播和长期价值一致性。VGIR框架利用轻量级VLM自动检测和修正价值错配，生成高质量、伦理对齐的标注，从而增强安全关键评估的可扩展性并降低成本。
light_analysis.result: VGIR框架将标注准确率从72.2%提升至83.3%，相对提升15.3%。DIQ-H基准揭示了VLM在错误恢复、伦理一致性和时间价值对齐方面的脆弱性，为具身AI安全评估提供了稳健平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为VLM鲁棒性评估提供了新基准和自动化标注框架，有助于发现模型在真实部署中的安全风险。未来可扩展至更多复杂扰动和动态环境。

title: Training-Free Loosely Speculative Decoding: Accepting Semantically Correct Drafts Beyond Exact Match
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across diverse tasks but suffer from high inference latency due to their autoregressive generation. Speculative Decoding (SPD) mitigates this issue by verifying candidate tokens in parallel from a smaller draft model, yet its strict exact-match verification discards many semantically valid continuations. Moreover, existing training-based SPD methods often suffer from performance degradation on out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks. To this end, we propose Training-Free Loosely Speculative Decoding (FLy), a novel method that loosens the rigid verification criterion by leveraging the target model's self-corrective behavior to judge whether a draft-target mismatch remains semantically valid. FLy introduces a two-tier mechanism: an entropy-level gate that identifies whether the current token allows multiple plausible alternatives or is nearly deterministic, and a token-level deferred window that distinguishes genuine errors from differently worded yet semantically correct variants. To further reduce latency, we design a multi-level acceleration strategy that accelerates not only the target model but also the drafter itself. Owing to its training-free design, FLy composes seamlessly with arbitrary draft-target pairs and generalizes across models and domains without hyperparameter re-tuning. Experiments show that FLy preserves more than 99% of the target model's accuracy while achieving an average 2.81x speedup on Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct and 5.07x speedup on the 405B variant. Notably, on out-of-domain datasets, our method remains highly effective and outperforms the training-based method EAGLE-3 by 1.62x.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练、宽松验证的推测解码方法FLy，通过语义正确性判断替代精确匹配，显著加速LLM推理并保准准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型自回归生成导致高推理延迟。现有推测解码（SPD）通过并行验证小模型候选token缓解延迟，但严格精确匹配丢弃许多语义有效的续写。此外，基于训练的SPD方法在分布外（OOD）任务上性能下降，且需重新调参。因此需要一种无需训练、能接受语义正确草稿的宽松验证方法。
light_analysis.method: FLy提出两层次机制：熵门控判断当前token是否允许多种合理替代，以及token级延迟窗口区分真正错误与不同措辞但语义正确的变体。利用目标模型自纠正行为进行验证。同时设计多级加速策略，既加速目标模型也加速草稿模型。无需训练，可无缝组合任意草稿-目标模型对，泛化到不同模型和领域。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct上平均加速2.81倍，405B变体加速5.07倍，保留超过99%的目标模型准确率。在分布外数据集上，仍高度有效，比基于训练的方法EAGLE-3快1.62倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLy通过宽松的语义验证和无需训练设计，有效提升推测解码的加速比和泛化能力，同时保持高准确率。学术上揭示了语义正确性替代精确匹配的潜力，实际中可即插即用降低推理成本。未来可探索更精细的验证策略或扩展到多模态模型。

title: Tell Model Where to Look: Mitigating Hallucinations in MLLMs by Vision-Guided Attention
abstract: Visual attention serves as the primary mechanism through which MLLMs interpret visual information; however, its limited localization capability often leads to hallucinations. We observe that although MLLMs can accurately extract visual semantics from visual tokens, they fail to fully leverage this advantage during subsequent inference. To address this limitation, we propose Vision-Guided Attention (VGA), a training-free method that first constructs precise visual grounding by exploiting the semantic content of visual tokens, and then uses this grounding to guide the model's focus toward relevant visual regions. In image captioning, VGA further refines this guidance dynamically during generation by suppressing regions that have already been described. In VGA, each token undergoes only a single forward pass, introducing a negligible latency overhead. In addition, VGA is fully compatible with efficient attention implementations such as FlashAttention. Extensive experiments across diverse MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks demonstrate that VGA achieves state-of-the-art dehallucination performance. Further analysis confirms that explicit visual guidance plays a crucial role in enhancing the visual understanding capabilities of MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出训练免费的视觉引导注意力方法，通过精确视觉定位减少MLLM幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: MLLM依赖视觉注意力解释图像，但定位能力弱导致幻觉。尽管模型能从视觉token提取语义，后续推理却未充分利用此优势，需显式引导模型关注相关视觉区域。
light_analysis.method: 提出VGA方法，利用视觉token的语义内容构建精确视觉定位，据此引导注意力聚焦相关区域；图像描述任务中动态抑制已描述区域。单次前向传播，延迟极小，兼容FlashAttention等高效注意力实现。
light_analysis.result: 在多种MLLM和多个幻觉基准上取得最先进的去幻觉性能，验证了显式视觉引导对提升MLLM视觉理解能力的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VGA以训练免费、轻量高效的方式缓解MLLM幻觉问题，通过显式视觉引导增强模型视觉理解能力，为多模态大模型的可靠性提供新思路。

title: SkyReels-Text: Fine-Grained Font-Controllable Text Editing for Poster Design
abstract: Artistic design, particularly poster design, often demands rapid yet precise modification of textual content while preserving visual harmony and typographic intent, especially across diverse font styles. Although modern image editing models have grown increasingly powerful, they still fall short in fine-grained, font-aware text manipulation, limiting their utility in professional workflows. To address this issue, we present SkyReels-Text, a novel font-controllable framework for precise poster text editing. Our method enables simultaneous editing of multiple text regions, each rendered in distinct typographic styles, while preserving the visual appearance of non-edited regions. Notably, our model requires neither font labels nor test-time fine-tuning: users can simply provide cropped glyph patches corresponding to their desired typography - even if the font is not included in any standard library. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that SkyReels-Text achieves state-of-the-art performance in both text fidelity and visual realism, offering unprecedented control over font families and stylistic nuances. This work bridges the gap between general-purpose image editing and professional-grade typographic design. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/SkyworkAI/SkyReels-Text.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需微调和字体标签的字体可控文本编辑框架，支持多区域不同字体风格编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 海报设计需要快速精确修改文字并保持视觉和谐，但现有图像编辑模型在字体感知文本操作上不足，无法满足专业工作流程中对多种字体风格的精细控制需求，且通常需要字体标签或额外微调，限制了实用性和效率。
light_analysis.method: SkyReels-Text框架通过用户提供的裁剪字形补丁实现所需字体，无需字体标签或测试时微调。它支持同时编辑多个文本区域，每个区域可指定不同字体风格，同时保持非编辑区域视觉一致性。该方法利用预训练模型和条件机制，实现字体级控制。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SkyReels-Text在文本保真度和视觉真实感方面达到最先进性能，优于现有方法。它提供了对字体家族和风格细微差别的空前控制，定量和定性评估均显示显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作弥合了通用图像编辑与专业排版设计之间的差距，为海报文字编辑提供了高效精确的解决方案。公开代码和模型有助于实际应用。未来可探索更复杂的字体风格学习和更高效的编辑流程。

title: Stress Testing Factual Consistency Metrics for Long-Document Summarization
abstract: Evaluating the factual consistency of abstractive text summarization remains a significant challenge, particularly for long documents, where conventional metrics struggle with input length limitations and long-range dependencies. In this work, we systematically evaluate the reliability of six widely used reference-free factuality metrics, originally proposed for short-form summarization, in the long-document setting. We probe metric robustness through seven factuality-preserving perturbations applied to summaries, namely paraphrasing, simplification, synonym replacement, logically equivalent negations, vocabulary reduction, compression, and source text insertion, and further analyze their sensitivity to retrieval context and claim information density. Across three long-form benchmark datasets spanning science fiction, legal, and scientific domains, our results reveal that existing short-form metrics produce inconsistent scores for semantically equivalent summaries and exhibit declining reliability for information-dense claims whose content is semantically similar to many parts of the source document. While expanding the retrieval context improves stability in some domains, no metric consistently maintains factual alignment under long-context conditions. Finally, our results highlight concrete directions for improving factuality evaluation, including multi-span reasoning, context-aware calibration, and training on meaning-preserving variations to enhance robustness in long-form summarization. We release all code, perturbed data, and scripts required to reproduce our results at https://github.com/zainmujahid/metricEval-longSum.
comment: Accepted in Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估六个短文档事实性度量在长文档摘要中的可靠性，通过七种保义扰动测试其鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估抽象摘要事实一致性仍具挑战，尤其是长文档，传统度量受限于输入长度和长距离依赖。现有短文本度量在长文档中的表现未知，需系统评估其可靠性，以识别其局限性并指导改进。
light_analysis.method: 选取六个无参考事实性度量（原用于短文本），对长文档摘要施加七种保义扰动：释义、简化、同义词替换、逻辑等价否定、词汇缩减、压缩、源文本插入。分析度量对检索上下文和信息密度的敏感性，使用三个长文档数据集（科幻、法律、科学）。
light_analysis.result: 现有短文本度量对语义等价摘要产生不一致分数，信息密集声明可靠性下降；扩展检索上下文在某些领域改善稳定性，但无度量在长上下文中保持事实对齐；揭示了多跨度推理、上下文感知校准等改进方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统评估揭示了短文本度量在长文档摘要中的鲁棒性不足，提供了具体改进方向（多跨度推理、上下文感知校准、训练保义变体）。开源代码和数据便于复现，对长文档摘要评估有重要参考价值。

title: FedPF: Accurate Target Privacy Preserving Federated Learning Balancing Fairness and Utility
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without data sharing, yet participants face a fundamental challenge, e.g., simultaneously ensuring fairness across demographic groups while protecting sensitive client data. We introduce a differentially private fair FL algorithm (FedPF) that transforms this multi-objective optimization into a zero-sum game where fairness and privacy constraints compete against model utility. Our theoretical analysis reveals an inverse relationship: privacy mechanisms that protect sensitive attributes can reduce the statistical power available for detecting and correcting demographic biases under finite samples in federated settings. We further show that our theoretical bounds are consistent with a non-monotonic fairness-utility relationship, which is empirically validated by experiments where moderate fairness constraints improve generalization before excessive enforcement degrades performance. Compared with mainstream algorithms, even under strict privacy constraints, FedPF still maintains the lowest discrimination level among all tested algorithms while retaining high utility. Experimental validation demonstrates up to 42.9 % discrimination reduction across three datasets while maintaining competitive accuracy, but more importantly, reveals that achieving strong privacy and fairness simultaneously requires carefully balanced tradeoffs rather than optimizing either objective in isolation. Furthermore, hardware-level simulations demonstrate that FedPF maintains a low computational footprint, making it suitable for resource-constrained edge devices. The source code for our proposed algorithm is publicly accessible at https://github.com/szpsunkk/FedPF.
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, 33 conference, The paper has been accepted by ICDCS conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedPF算法，通过零和博弈平衡联邦学习中的隐私、公平与效用，理论揭示隐私与公平的逆向关系，实验实现低歧视与高精度的兼顾。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习虽能协作训练而不共享数据，但参与者面临同时确保跨群体公平性和保护敏感客户数据的根本挑战。现有方法难以兼顾隐私保护与公平性，往往在优化一个目标时牺牲另一个。该研究旨在解决如何在有限样本下协调隐私机制与公平约束，避免过度矫正导致性能下降的问题。
light_analysis.method: FedPF将多目标优化转化为零和博弈，其中公平性和隐私约束与模型效用相互竞争。理论分析表明隐私机制会削弱检测和纠正人口统计偏差的统计能力，且公平-效用关系呈非单调性。算法在差分隐私框架下实现，通过动态平衡隐私预算和公平正则化项来优化目标。实验在三个数据集上进行，并与主流算法对比。
light_analysis.result: FedPF在严格隐私约束下仍保持所有测试算法中最低的歧视水平，同时维持高效用。在三个数据集上实现了高达42.9%的歧视降低，同时保持有竞争力的准确率。硬件级仿真表明计算开销低，适合资源受限的边缘设备。实验结果还揭示强隐私与强公平需精心平衡而非单独优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedPF为联邦学习提供了兼顾隐私、公平与效用的有效方案，通过零和博弈框架揭示了隐私与公平的权衡本质。实验验证了理论分析，并表明适度公平约束可改善泛化。研究价值在于为现实部署（如医疗、金融）提供可解释的平衡策略，未来可探索动态调整隐私预算以适配不同场景。

title: Structured and Abstractive Reasoning on Multi-modal Relational Knowledge Images
abstract: Understanding and reasoning with abstractive information from the visual modality presents significant challenges for current multi-modal large language models (MLLMs). Among the various forms of abstractive information, Multi-Modal Relational Knowledge (MMRK), which represents abstract relational structures between multi-modal entities using node-edge formats, remains largely under-explored. In particular, STructured and Abstractive Reasoning (STAR) on such data has received little attention from the research community. To bridge the dual gaps in large-scale high-quality data and capability enhancement methodologies, this paper makes the following key contributions: (i). An automatic STAR data engine capable of synthesizing images with MMRK to build multi-modal instruction data with reliable chain-of-thought thinking for various STAR tasks and (ii). A comprehsive two-stage capability enhancement training framework, accompanied by a suite of evaluation protocols tailored to different STAR tasks. Based upon these contributions, we introduce STAR-64K, a dataset comprising 64K high-quality multi-modal instruction samples, and conduct experiments across 5 open-source MLLMs. Experimental results show that our two-stage enhancement framework enables smaller 3B/7B models to significantly outperform GPT-4o in STAR. Additionally, we provide in-depth analysis regarding the effectiveness of various designs, data transferability, and scalability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动数据引擎和两阶段训练框架，用于多模态关系图像的抽象推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大模型难以理解视觉中的抽象信息，尤其是多模态关系知识（MMRK）的抽象推理。现有方法缺乏大规模高质量数据和能力增强方法，导致STAR任务研究不足。
light_analysis.method: 设计自动STAR数据引擎，合成带MMRK的图像并生成多模态指令数据及可靠思维链；提出两阶段能力增强训练框架，配套评估协议。构建STAR-64K数据集，含64K高质量样本。
light_analysis.result: 在5个开源MLLM上实验，两阶段框架使3B/7B小模型在STAR任务上显著超过GPT-4o。深入分析了设计有效性、数据可迁移性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 填补了多模态关系知识抽象推理的数据与方法空白，显著提升小模型推理能力，为未来研究提供基础。

title: When Annotators Disagree, Topology Explains: Mapper, a Topological Tool for Exploring Text Embedding Geometry and Ambiguity
abstract: Language models are often evaluated with scalar metrics like accuracy, but such measures fail to capture how models internally represent ambiguity, especially when human annotators disagree. We propose a topological perspective to analyze how fine-tuned models encode ambiguity and more generally instances.   Applied to RoBERTa-Large on the MD-Offense dataset, Mapper, a tool from topological data analysis, reveals that fine-tuning restructures embedding space into modular, non-convex regions aligned with model predictions, even for highly ambiguous cases. Over $98\%$ of connected components exhibit $\geq 90\%$ prediction purity, yet alignment with ground-truth labels drops in ambiguous data, surfacing a hidden tension between structural confidence and label uncertainty.   Unlike traditional tools such as PCA or UMAP, Mapper captures this geometry directly uncovering decision regions, boundary collapses, and overconfident clusters. Our findings position Mapper as a powerful diagnostic tool for understanding how models resolve ambiguity. Beyond visualization, it also enables topological metrics that may inform proactive modeling strategies in subjective NLP tasks.
comment: Accepted to appear in the Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2025, Main Conference)

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用拓扑数据分析工具Mapper分析语言模型编码歧义的能力，揭示微调后模型嵌入空间的模块化结构及其与预测一致性的关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型常用标量指标（如准确率）评估，但无法捕捉模型内部对歧义的表示，尤其是在人类标注者意见不一致时。现有方法如PCA或UMAP无法直接揭示决策区域、边界坍缩和过度自信聚类等几何特征。需一种能理解模型如何解决歧义的新型诊断工具。
light_analysis.method: 采用拓扑数据分析中的Mapper工具，分析微调后的RoBERTa-Large在MD-Offense数据集上的嵌入几何结构。Mapper通过覆盖和聚类构建图表示，揭示嵌入空间被重构为与模型预测对齐的模块化非凸区域。不同于传统降维方法，Mapper直接捕捉决策区域、边界坍缩和过度自信聚类。
light_analysis.result: 超过98%的连通组件具有≥90%的预测纯度，但若对齐真实标签，则在歧义数据上纯度下降，揭示结构置信度与标签不确定性之间的隐藏矛盾。相比PCA或UMAP，Mapper能直接捕捉这种几何结构，暴露决策区域和边界坍缩。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mapper作为理解模型如何解决歧义的有力诊断工具，不仅提供可视化，还引入拓扑指标，可在主观NLP任务中指导主动建模策略。未来可用于检测模型过度自信区域，提升鲁棒性。

title: A Multimodal Depth-Aware Method For Embodied Reference Understanding
abstract: Embodied Reference Understanding requires identifying a target object in a visual scene based on both language instructions and pointing cues. While prior works have shown progress in open-vocabulary object detection, they often fail in ambiguous scenarios where multiple candidate objects exist in the scene. To address these challenges, we propose a novel ERU framework that jointly leverages LLM-based data augmentation, depth-map modality, and a depth-aware decision module. This design enables robust integration of linguistic and embodied cues, improving disambiguation in complex or cluttered environments. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving more accurate and reliable referent detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态深度感知的具身参考理解方法，融合LLM数据增强、深度图和深度感知决策模块，解决模糊场景下的指代物识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法在多个候选对象的模糊场景中常失败，而具身参考理解需要结合语言指令和指向线索准确识别目标，缺乏深度信息导致歧义难以消除。
light_analysis.method: 构建ERU框架，包含LLM数据增强生成多样化训练样本，引入深度图模态提供空间几何信息，并设计深度感知决策模块融合语言和指向线索进行鲁棒推理，提升歧义场景下的识别能力。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基线，实现了更准确、更可靠的指代物检测，验证了多模态深度信息在消除歧义中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新颖的多模态深度感知方法，有效解决具身参考理解中的歧义问题，推动了多模态融合在具身AI中的应用，未来可探索更复杂的交互场景。

title: Incorporating Expert Knowledge into Bayesian Causal Discovery of Mixtures of Directed Acyclic Graphs
abstract: Bayesian causal discovery benefits from prior information elicited from domain experts, and in heterogeneous domains any prior knowledge would be badly needed. However, so far prior elicitation approaches have assumed a single causal graph and hence are not suited to heterogeneous domains. We propose a causal elicitation strategy for heterogeneous settings, based on Bayesian experimental design (BED) principles, and a variational mixture structure learning (VaMSL) method -- extending the earlier differentiable Bayesian structure learning (DiBS) method -- to iteratively infer mixtures of causal Bayesian networks (CBNs). We construct an informative graph prior incorporating elicited expert feedback in the inference of mixtures of CBNs. Our proposed method successfully produces a set of alternative causal models (mixture components or clusters), and achieves an improved structure learning performance on heterogeneous synthetic data when informed by a simulated expert. Finally, we demonstrate that our approach is capable of capturing complex distributions in a breast cancer database.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将专家知识融入贝叶斯因果发现，用于混合有向无环图，扩展了先前方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有贝叶斯因果发现假设单一因果图，不适用于异构领域；异构领域迫切需要先验知识，但目前先验引出方法不适用于异构设置。
light_analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯实验设计（BED）原则提出因果引出策略；扩展可微贝叶斯结构学习（DiBS）方法，提出变分混合结构学习（VaMSL）方法，迭代推断混合因果贝叶斯网络。构建信息性图先验，融入专家反馈。
light_analysis.result: 成功生成一组替代因果模型（混合成分/聚类）；在异构合成数据上，有模拟专家信息时结构学习性能提升；在乳腺癌数据库中捕获复杂分布。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了将专家知识融入异构因果发现的有效性，提供了新方法VaMSL，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可能扩展到更复杂领域。

title: Teaching LLM to be Persuasive: Reward-Enhanced Policy Optimization for Alignment from Heterogeneous Rewards
abstract: We deploy large language models (LLMs) as business development (BD) agents for persuasive price negotiation in online travel agencies (OTAs). The agent must follow a multi-stage Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) and strict guardrails (no over-promising and no hallucinations), while remaining human-like and effective over long, multi-turn dialogues. We propose Reward-Enhanced Policy Optimization (REPO), a reinforcement learning post-training method that combines heterogeneous rewards: a preference-trained reward model (RM), an LLM-as-a-judge (RJ) for nuanced behaviors (e.g., emotional value and SOP compliance), and rule-based reward functions (RF) (mainly regex-based) for deterministic checks on numerics, formatting, and guardrails. In expert consensus evaluation (three human experts; 30 online conversations and 45 curated bad cases), REPO improves average dialogue rating to 4.63 (+0.33 over GRPO) and raises the share of conversations with at least one excellent response to 66.67% (+23.34 pp over GRPO), while achieving a 93.33% bad-case fix rate with 75.56% clean fixes. In a production A/B test on 9,653 real customer conversations (vs. an intent-driven dialogue system), REPO improves response rate by +12.14 pp and task success rate by +5.94 pp (p<0.001).

light_analysis.overview: 提出REPO方法，通过异构奖励强化学习优化LLM，使其在说服性价格谈判中遵循SOP和护栏，提升对话质量和任务成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在在线旅行社中，LLM作为BD代理进行说服性价格谈判，需遵循多阶段SOP和严格护栏（禁止过度承诺和幻觉），同时保持类人且有效的长对话。现有强化学习方法难以融合多种异构奖励信号（如偏好、规则、细微行为），导致对齐不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出Reward-Enhanced Policy Optimization (REPO)，一种强化学习后训练方法，融合三种异构奖励：偏好训练奖励模型(RM)、LLM-as-a-judge (RJ)评估情感价值与SOP遵循、基于规则的正则函数(RF)进行确定性检查。通过组合奖励优化策略，在保持护栏的同时提升说服效果。
light_analysis.result: 在专家共识评估中，REPO将平均对话评分提升至4.63（优于GRPO 0.33），优秀对话比例达66.67%（+23.34 pp），坏案例修复率93.33%，干净修复率75.56%。生产A/B测试（9653次对话）中，回复率提升12.14个百分点，任务成功率提升5.94个百分点（p<0.001）。
light_analysis.conclusion: REPO有效融合异构奖励信号，显著提升LLM在复杂业务场景中的说服能力和对齐效果。该方法适用于需遵循严格规范的多轮对话任务，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的奖励组合或扩展到其他领域。

title: PATCH: Learnable Tile-level Hybrid Sparsity for LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) deliver impressive performance but incur prohibitive memory and compute costs at deployment. Model pruning is an effective way to reduce these overheads, yet existing approaches face challenges: unstructured sparsity, where nonzeros can appear anywhere, preserves accuracy but yields irregular access patterns that prevent GPU acceleration, while semi-structured 2:4 sparsity is hardware-friendly but enforces a rigid 50% pattern that degrades model quality. To bridge this gap, we introduce PATCH, a hybrid sparsity framework that enables a continuous sparsity ratio between 0% and 50%. PATCH partitions weight matrices into tiles, assigning each tile to be either dense or 2:4 sparse via a learnable mask selection mechanism. This design provides fine-grained control over accuracy-acceleration tradeoffs and supports non-uniform sparsity across layers, leading to superior overall quality. Across models from 0.5B to 13B parameters, PATCH consistently narrows the gap to dense accuracy while delivering practical speedups. For instance, on LLaMA-2 7B with an A6000 GPU, PATCH achieves 1.18x-1.38x end-to-end speedup over dense baselines while improving accuracy by 0.37%-2.96% compared to the state-of-the-art 2:4 pruning method, MaskLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PATCH，一种可学习的tile级混合稀疏框架，通过灵活分配dense或2:4稀疏tile实现0%-50%连续稀疏率，在保持GPU加速的同时提升LLM剪枝精度。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM部署内存和计算成本高，模型剪枝可降低开销。非结构化剪枝精度好但GPU加速困难，半结构化2:4剪枝硬件友好但强制50%稀疏率导致精度损失。现有方法无法在精度与加速间灵活权衡，亟需一种既支持硬件加速又允许可控稀疏率的方法。
light_analysis.method: PATCH将权重矩阵划分为tile，每个tile通过可学习的掩码选择机制被分配为dense或2:4稀疏，实现0%-50%的连续稀疏率。支持跨层非均匀稀疏分配，提供细粒度精度-加速控制。该方法可无缝集成到现有LLM中，无需特殊硬件支持。
light_analysis.result: 在0.5B至13B参数模型上，PATCH持续缩小与dense模型的精度差距，并实现实际加速。例如，LLaMA-2 7B在A6000 GPU上取得1.18x-1.38x端到端加速，相比最先进2:4剪枝方法MaskLLM，精度提升0.37%-2.96%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PATCH通过可学习的混合稀疏策略有效平衡LLM剪枝精度与推理加速，细粒度tile控制和跨层非均匀分配带来质量优势。适用于多种规模模型，未来可探索更高效的tile划分或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: Failure Modes of Maximum Entropy RLHF
abstract: In this paper, we show that Simple Preference Optimization (SimPO) can be derived as Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning, providing a theoretical foundation for this reference-free method. Motivated by SimPO's strong performance in offline preference optimization, we investigate whether Maximum Entropy RL can achieve similar results in online RLHF settings. Our experiments find that Maximum Entropy RL frequently exhibits overoptimization and unstable KL dynamics across model scales, with overoptimization persisting even at conservative learning rates for some configurations. Unlike KL-constrained methods that maintain stable training, entropy regularization fails to reliably prevent reward hacking and, in our experiments, correlates with the onset of overoptimization rather than guarding against it. Even in configurations where training remains stable, entropy regularization is not the stabilizing factor. Lastly, we discuss possible explanations for why SimPO succeeds in offline settings while Maximum Entropy RL struggles in online scenarios. Our findings suggest that reference-free approaches may face distinct challenges when applied to online versus offline preference learning.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示最大熵RL在在线RLHF中频繁出现过优化和不稳定KL动态等失败模式，并解释SimPO离线成功而最大熵RL在线失效的原因。
light_analysis.motivation: SimPO作为无参考方法在离线偏好优化中表现优异，且可从最大熵RL推导。但最大熵RL在在线RLHF中的表现未知。现有KL约束方法训练稳定，而最大熵正则化可能无法防止奖励破解。需要探究其在线场景下的失败模式，为无参考方法的应用提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验比较最大熵RL与KL约束方法在在线RLHF中的表现，跨模型规模观察过优化和KL动态稳定性。分析SimPO离线成功与最大熵RL在线失败的可能原因，包括熵正则化与过优化的相关性以及稳定训练中的非主导作用。
light_analysis.result: 最大熵RL频繁出现过优化和不稳定KL动态，过优化在保守学习率下仍存在。熵正则化与过优化onset相关而非防止，即使训练稳定也不是稳定因素。表明无参考方法在在线场景面临独特挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 无参考方法（如最大熵RL）在在线和离线偏好学习中面临不同挑战，在线场景中熵正则化可能诱发过优化。该研究深化了对RLHF中熵正则化作用的理解，为设计稳定在线算法提供了警示，未来需探索更有效的正则化策略。

title: Heterogeneous Adaptive Policy Optimization: Tailoring Optimization to Every Token's Nature
abstract: Using entropy as a measure of heterogeneity to guide optimization has emerged as a crucial research direction in Reinforcement Learning for LLMs. However, existing methods typically treat it as a discrete filter or post-hoc regulator rather than a core optimization driver. To fully leverage the potential of entropy and achieve fine-grained regulation, we introduce Heterogeneous Adaptive Policy Optimization (HAPO), a token-aware algorithm that continuously adapts optimization dynamics based on token-level entropy throughout the entire training process. Our algorithm includes four key components: (1) Adaptive Temperature Sampling that adjusts sampling temperature in real time, promoting exploration at high-entropy tokens. (2) Token-Level Group Average Advantage Estimation that estimates advantages at token level, accounting for sequence-length effects while preserving non-biased treatment.(3) Differential Advantage Redistribution that leverages entropy and importance ratios to adjust advantages for tokens with clear signals. (4) Asymmetric Adaptive Clipping that adynamically adjusts clipping boundaries based on token-level entropy. Through systematic investigation of entropy, we embed token-level treatment into every stage. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning, code, and logic tasks across multiple models demonstrate HAPO's consistent superiority over DAPO. Our code can be found in https://github.com/starriver030515/HAPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HAPO算法，通过token级熵实现连续自适应优化，在RLHF中达到细粒度调控。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLHF方法仅将熵作为离散过滤器或事后调节器，未能充分利用其异质性指导优化。HAPO旨在将熵作为核心优化驱动力，实现基于每个token特性的实时自适应调整，以解决训练中不同token优化需求不一致的问题，提升模型在数学推理、代码生成等任务上的性能。
light_analysis.method: HAPO包含四组件：自适应温度采样根据高熵token实时调整温度促进探索；token级组平均优势估计在token层面计算优势，消除序列长度偏差；差分优势重分配利用熵和重要性比率重新调整清晰信号token的优势；非对称自适应裁剪基于token熵动态调整裁剪边界。这些模块共同实现训练全过程的token级细粒度优化。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和逻辑推理任务上，对多个模型（具体模型未明确）进行实验，HAPO一致优于DAPO（基准方法）。摘要未提供具体性能指标数值，但表明HAPO在多种任务中均能提升优化效果，验证了token级自适应优化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAPO通过将熵驱动优化嵌入每一训练步骤，实现了对语言模型策略的精细调节，显著提升了RLHF的性能。该工作展示了token级异质性在强化学习中的潜力，并为未来研究提供了新方向。代码已开源，便于复现与扩展。局限包括对计算资源的潜在需求及超参数敏感性（摘要未明确）。

title: The Prompt Engineering Report Distilled: Quick Start Guide for Life Sciences
abstract: Developing effective prompts demands significant cognitive investment to generate reliable, high-quality responses from Large Language Models (LLMs). By deploying case-specific prompt engineering techniques that streamline frequently performed life sciences workflows, researchers could achieve substantial efficiency gains that far exceed the initial time investment required to master these techniques. The Prompt Report published in 2025 outlined 58 different text-based prompt engineering techniques, highlighting the numerous ways prompts could be constructed. To provide actionable guidelines and reduce the friction of navigating these various approaches, we distil this report to focus on 6 core techniques: zero-shot, few-shot approaches, thought generation, ensembling, self-criticism, and decomposition. We breakdown the significance of each approach and ground it in use cases relevant to life sciences, from literature summarization and data extraction to editorial tasks. We provide detailed recommendations for how prompts should and shouldn't be structured, addressing common pitfalls including multi-turn conversation degradation, hallucinations, and distinctions between reasoning and non-reasoning models. We examine context window limitations, agentic tools like Claude Code, while analyzing the effectiveness of Deep Research tools across OpenAI, Google, Anthropic and Perplexity platforms, discussing current limitations. We demonstrate how prompt engineering can augment rather than replace existing established individual practices around data processing and document editing. Our aim is to provide actionable guidance on core prompt engineering principles, and to facilitate the transition from opportunistic prompting to an effective, low-friction systematic practice that contributes to higher quality research.

light_analysis.overview: 将58种提示工程技术浓缩为6种核心方法，为生命科学研究者提供可操作的快速入门指南。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）的提示制定需要大量认知投入，生命科学研究者在日常工作中频繁使用LLM但效率不高。现有的提示工程技术多达58种，缺乏简洁、针对性的指南。该研究旨在降低入门门槛，帮助研究者快速掌握核心技巧以提升工作效率。
light_analysis.method: 从2025年发布的《提示工程报告》中提炼出6种核心技术：零样本、少样本、思维生成、集成、自我批判和分解。针对每种技术，用生命科学的具体用例（文献总结、数据提取、编辑任务）解释其意义。提供详细的结构建议，避免常见陷阱（多轮对话退化、幻觉、推理与非推理模型的区别），并讨论上下文窗口限制和Agentic工具（如Claude Code）及Deep Research工具。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供量化实验结果，但强调通过系统化实践可显著提升效率，将机会性提示转变为高效、低摩擦的常规流程，最终提高研究质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为生命科学研究者提供了核心提示工程原则的实用指南，帮助其从偶然使用LLM转向系统化实践，不仅提升效率还增强研究成果质量。揭示了提示工程作为现有工作流程的补充而非替代的价值。未来仍需关注工具限制和多模型差异。

title: Action Hints: Semantic Typicality and Context Uniqueness for Generalizable Skeleton-based Video Anomaly Detection
abstract: Zero-Shot Video Anomaly Detection (ZS-VAD) requires temporally localizing anomalies without target domain training data, which is a crucial task due to various practical concerns, e.g., data privacy or new surveillance deployments. Skeleton-based approach has inherent generalizable advantages in achieving ZS-VAD as it eliminates domain disparities both in background and human appearance. However, existing methods only learn low-level skeleton representation and rely on the domain-limited normality boundary, which cannot generalize well to new scenes with different normal and abnormal behavior patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel zero-shot video anomaly detection framework, unlocking the potential of skeleton data via action typicality and uniqueness learning. Firstly, we introduce a language-guided semantic typicality modeling module that projects skeleton snippets into action semantic space and distills LLM's knowledge of typical normal and abnormal behaviors during training. Secondly, we propose a test-time context uniqueness analysis module to finely analyze the spatio-temporal differences between skeleton snippets and then derive scene-adaptive boundaries. Without using any training samples from the target domain, our method achieves state-of-the-art results against skeleton-based methods on four large-scale VAD datasets: ShanghaiTech, UBnormal, NWPU, and UCF-Crime, featuring over 100 unseen surveillance scenes.
comment: The paper has been accepted by Pattern Recognition (PR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于骨架数据的零样本视频异常检测框架，通过语言引导的语义典型性和上下文唯一性学习，实现跨场景泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本视频异常检测方法依赖低层骨架表示和领域受限的正常性边界，难以泛化到具有不同正常和异常行为模式的新场景。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过利用大语言模型的知识和测试时上下文分析，提升骨架数据在零样本异常检测中的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Action Hints框架，包含两个核心模块：1）语言引导的语义典型性建模模块，将骨架片段投影到动作语义空间，蒸馏大语言模型关于典型正常/异常行为的知识；2）测试时上下文唯一性分析模块，精细分析骨架片段的时空差异，推导场景自适应边界。无需目标域训练样本。
light_analysis.result: 在四个大规模数据集（ShanghaiTech、UBnormal、NWPU、UCF-Crime）上，覆盖超过100个未见过的监控场景，取得骨架方法中的最先进结果，超越现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过语义典型性和上下文唯一性学习，提升了骨架数据在零样本视频异常检测中的泛化能力，为无监督跨场景异常检测提供了有效方案。未来可进一步探索更复杂的动作语义表示和场景自适应策略。

title: Adaptive Scaling of Policy Constraints for Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) enables learning effective policies from fixed datasets without any environment interaction. Existing methods typically employ policy constraints to mitigate the distribution shift encountered during offline RL training. However, because the scale of the constraints varies across tasks and datasets of differing quality, existing methods must meticulously tune hyperparameters to match each dataset, which is time-consuming and often impractical. We propose Adaptive Scaling of Policy Constraints (ASPC), a second-order differentiable framework that dynamically balances RL and behavior cloning (BC) during training. We theoretically analyze its performance improvement guarantee. In experiments on 39 datasets across four D4RL domains, ASPC using a single hyperparameter configuration outperforms other adaptive constraint methods and state-of-the-art offline RL algorithms that require per-dataset tuning while incurring only minimal computational overhead. The code will be released at https://github.com/Colin-Jing/ASPC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应策略约束缩放框架ASPC，动态平衡强化学习与行为克隆，实现单一超参数配置在多种离线数据集上超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习通常使用策略约束来缓解分布偏移，但现有方法需要针对不同任务和数据集精心调参，耗时且不实用。因此需要一种自适应方法，能在不同质量的数据集上自动调整约束强度，无需逐个数据集调参。
light_analysis.method: ASPC是一个二阶可微框架，通过动态调整强化学习与行为克隆的权重来平衡策略约束。理论分析提供了性能改进保证。在四个D4RL领域的39个数据集上进行实验，采用单一超参数配置，避免了逐数据集调参。
light_analysis.result: ASPC使用单一超参数配置，在39个D4RL数据集上超越了其他自适应约束方法和需要逐数据集调参的最先进离线强化学习算法，且计算开销极小。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASPC有效解决了离线强化学习中策略约束尺度适应性问题，降低了调参成本，提升了实用性。未来可探索更复杂的自适应机制或扩展到其他离线学习场景。代码已开源。

title: Robust Federated Learning under Adversarial Attacks via Loss-Based Client Clustering
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training across multiple clients without sharing private data. We consider FL scenarios wherein FL clients are subject to adversarial (Byzantine) attacks, while the FL server is trusted (honest) and has a trustworthy side dataset. This may correspond to, e.g., cases where the server possesses trusted data prior to federation, or to the presence of a trusted client that temporarily assumes the server role. Our approach requires only two honest participants, i.e., the server and one client, to function effectively, without prior knowledge of the number of malicious clients. Theoretical analysis demonstrates bounded optimality gaps even under strong Byzantine attacks. Experimental results show that our algorithm significantly outperforms standard and robust FL baselines such as Mean, Trimmed Mean, Median, Krum, and Multi-Krum under various attack strategies including label flipping, sign flipping, and Gaussian noise addition across MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR-10 benchmarks using the Flower framework.
comment: Accepted at the 3rd Workshop on Advancements in Federated Learning (WAFL@ECML-PKDD 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 基于损失函数聚类的鲁棒联邦学习方法，仅需两个诚实参与者即可抵御拜占庭攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端可能遭受拜占庭攻击，现有鲁棒聚合方法（如Median、Krum）通常需要事先知道恶意客户端数量或依赖多数诚实假设，这在现实中难以满足。本文旨在减少对诚实参与者数量的依赖，仅要求服务器和一个客户端诚实，从而在恶意客户端数量未知的场景下实现有效防御，提升联邦学习的实际可用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于损失函数的客户端聚类方法，服务器利用其拥有的可信侧数据集计算各客户端的损失值，通过聚类将恶意客户端与诚实客户端分离。该方法无需预先知道恶意客户端数量，仅依赖两个诚实参与者（服务器和一个客户端）即可正常工作。理论分析证明了在强拜占庭攻击下算法的最优性差距有界，保障了收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST、FMNIST、CIFAR-10数据集上，使用Flower框架模拟标签翻转、符号翻转和高斯噪声添加等攻击。所提算法在模型精度和鲁棒性上显著优于Mean、Trimmed Mean、Median、Krum和Multi-Krum等基线方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种实用的鲁棒联邦学习方法，仅需两个诚实参与者即可有效抵御拜占庭攻击，降低了联邦学习的部署门槛。理论分析和实验验证了其有效性和优越性。未来可探索更复杂的攻击模式或在非独立同分布数据下的扩展。

title: Beyond the Leaderboard: Rethinking Medical Benchmarks for Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show significant potential in healthcare, prompting numerous benchmarks to evaluate their capabilities. However, concerns persist regarding the reliability of these benchmarks, which often lack clinical fidelity, robust data management, and safety-oriented evaluation metrics. To address these shortcomings, we introduce MedCheck, the first lifecycle-oriented assessment framework specifically designed for medical benchmarks. Our framework deconstructs a benchmark's development into five continuous stages, from design to governance, and provides a comprehensive checklist of 46 medically-tailored criteria. Using MedCheck, we conducted an in-depth empirical evaluation of 53 medical LLM benchmarks. Our analysis uncovers widespread, systemic issues, including a profound disconnect from clinical practice, a crisis of data integrity due to unmitigated contamination risks, and a systematic neglect of safety-critical evaluation dimensions like model robustness and uncertainty awareness. Based on these findings, MedCheck serves as both a diagnostic tool for existing benchmarks and an actionable guideline to foster a more standardized, reliable, and transparent approach to evaluating AI in healthcare.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个生命周期导向的医疗LLM基准评估框架MedCheck，通过46条标准系统性揭示现有基准的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在医疗领域潜力巨大，但现有基准缺乏临床保真度、数据管理不健全、安全评估指标缺失，导致评估可靠性存疑。这些问题阻碍了LLM在医疗中的安全有效应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出MedCheck框架，将基准开发分解为设计、构建、执行、分析和治理五个阶段，制定46条医疗专属标准。对53个医疗LLM基准进行实证评估，涵盖临床相关性、数据完整性、安全性等多维度。
light_analysis.result: 发现基准存在三大系统性问题：与临床实践严重脱节、数据完整性危机（污染风险普遍）、安全维度（鲁棒性、不确定性等）被系统性忽视。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedCheck作为诊断工具可识别基准缺陷，并为构建标准化、可靠、透明的医疗AI评估提供行动指南。未来可用于指导新基准设计，促进LLM在医疗中的安全落地。

title: StreamAgent: Towards Anticipatory Agents for Streaming Video Understanding
abstract: Real-time streaming video understanding in domains such as autonomous driving and intelligent surveillance poses challenges beyond conventional offline video processing, requiring continuous perception, proactive decision making, and responsive interaction based on dynamically evolving visual content. However, existing methods rely on alternating perception-reaction or asynchronous triggers, lacking task-driven planning and future anticipation, which limits their real-time responsiveness and proactive decision making in evolving video streams. To this end, we propose a StreamAgent that anticipates the temporal intervals and spatial regions expected to contain future task-relevant information to enable proactive and goal-driven responses. Specifically, we integrate question semantics and historical observations through prompting the anticipatory agent to anticipate the temporal progression of key events, align current observations with the expected future evidence, and subsequently adjust the perception action (e.g., attending to task-relevant regions or continuously tracking in subsequent frames). To enable efficient inference, we design a streaming KV-cache memory mechanism that constructs a hierarchical memory structure for selective recall of relevant tokens, enabling efficient semantic retrieval while reducing the overhead of storing all tokens in the traditional KV-cache. Extensive experiments on streaming and long video understanding tasks demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods in response accuracy and real-time efficiency, highlighting its practical value for real-world streaming scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamAgent，通过预期未来任务相关信息的时间和空间区域，实现流媒体视频的主动感知与实时响应。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时流媒体视频理解（如自动驾驶、智能监控）需要连续感知和主动决策，但现有方法依赖交替感知-反应或异步触发，缺乏任务驱动的规划与未来预期，导致实时响应和主动决策能力不足。因此，需要一种能主动预测未来任务相关信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: StreamAgent通过提示预期智能体预测关键事件的时间进展，对齐当前观测与未来证据，调整感知动作（如关注任务相关区域或连续跟踪）。设计流式KV缓存记忆机制，构建分层记忆结构选择性召回相关令牌，实现高效语义检索并降低存储开销。
light_analysis.result: 在流媒体和长视频理解任务上，StreamAgent在响应准确性和实时效率方面均优于现有方法，表明其在实际流媒体场景中的实用价值。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamAgent通过预期未来信息实现了主动、目标驱动的流媒体视频理解，提升了实时性和准确性。其流式KV缓存机制为高效推理提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化记忆结构和扩展至更复杂场景。

title: MAGIC: Few-Shot Mask-Guided Anomaly Inpainting with Prompt Perturbation, Spatially Adaptive Guidance, and Context Awareness
abstract: Few-shot anomaly generation is a key challenge in industrial quality control. Although diffusion models are promising, existing methods struggle: global prompt-guided approaches corrupt normal regions, and existing inpainting-based methods often lack the in-distribution diversity essential for robust downstream models. We propose MAGIC, a fine-tuned inpainting framework that generates high-fidelity anomalies that strictly adhere to the mask while maximizing this diversity. MAGIC introduces three complementary components: (i) Gaussian prompt perturbation, which prevents model overfitting in the few-shot setting by learning and sampling from a smooth manifold of realistic anomalies, (ii) spatially adaptive guidance that applies distinct guidance strengths to the anomaly and background regions, and (iii) context-aware mask alignment to relocate masks for plausible placement within the host object. Under consistent identical evaluation protocol, MAGIC outperforms state-of-the-art methods on diverse anomaly datasets in downstream tasks.
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Findings. Supplementary material included after references. 47 pages, 47 figures, 28 tables. Code : https://github.com/SpatialAILab/MAGIC

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAGIC框架，通过高斯提示扰动、空间自适应引导和上下文感知掩膜对齐，实现少样本高保真异常生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本异常生成是工业质量控制的关键挑战。现有扩散模型方法中，全局提示引导会破坏正常区域，而基于修复的方法缺乏下游模型所需的分布内多样性。需要一种能在严格遵循掩膜的同时最大化异常多样性的生成方法。
light_analysis.method: MAGIC是一个微调的修复框架，包含三个互补组件：高斯提示扰动，通过在少数样本中学习并采样真实异常平滑流形来防止过拟合；空间自适应引导，对异常和背景区域施加不同的引导强度；上下文感知掩膜对齐，重新定位掩膜使其在宿主对象中合理放置。
light_analysis.result: 在一致统一的评估协议下，MAGIC在多个异常数据集的下游任务中优于最先进方法，生成高保真且多样化的异常，有效支持后续检测或分类模型训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAGIC解决了少样本异常生成中的过拟合和多样性不足问题，为工业质检提供了可靠的异常数据增强手段。未来工作可探索更高效的掩膜定位策略或扩展到更多领域。

title: MARVIS: Modality Adaptive Reasoning over VISualizations
abstract: Predictive applications of machine learning often rely on small (sub 1 Bn parameter) specialized models tuned to particular domains or modalities. Such models often achieve excellent performance, but lack flexibility. LLMs and VLMs offer versatility, but typically underperform specialized predictors, especially on non-traditional modalities and long-tail domains. We propose MARVIS (Modality Adaptive Reasoning over VISualizations), a system that transforms latent embedding spaces into visual representations and then leverages the spatial and fine-grained reasoning skills of VLMs to interpret the visualizations and utilize them for predictions successfully. MARVIS achieves competitive performance across vision, audio, biological, and tabular domains using a single 3B parameter model, yielding results that beat Gemini 2.0 by 16% on average. MARVIS drastically reduces the gap between LLM/VLMs approaches and specialized domain-specific methods, without requiring any domain-specific training. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/penfever/marvis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MARVIS系统，将潜在嵌入转化为可视化，利用VLM进行多模态预测，无需领域特定训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 专用机器学习模型性能优异但缺乏灵活性，LLM/VLM在非传统模态和长尾领域表现不佳。现有方法难以兼顾泛化性与专精度。
light_analysis.method: MARVIS将不同模态的潜在嵌入空间转换为视觉表示（如散点图、热力图），然后利用VLM的空间与细粒度推理能力进行预测。采用单一3B参数模型，无需领域特定训练。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉、音频、生物和表格领域取得竞争性结果，平均性能超越Gemini 2.0达16%，显著缩小了LLM/VLM与专用领域方法之间的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARVIS提供了一种通用预测框架，通过可视化嵌入空间桥接模态差异，展示了VLM在多模态预测中的潜力。开源代码与数据集促进后续研究。

title: LogitSpec: Accelerating Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding via Next Next Token Speculation
abstract: Speculative decoding (SD), where a small draft model is employed to propose draft tokens in advance and then the target model validates them in parallel, has emerged as a promising technique for LLM inference acceleration. Many endeavors to improve SD are to eliminate the need for a draft model and generate draft tokens in a retrieval-based manner in order to further alleviate the drafting overhead and significantly reduce the difficulty in deployment and applications. However, retrieval-based SD relies on a matching paradigm to retrieval the most relevant reference as the draft tokens, where these methods often fail to find matched and accurate draft tokens. To address this challenge, we propose LogitSpec to effectively expand the retrieval range and find the most relevant reference as drafts. Our LogitSpec is motivated by the observation that the logit of the last token can not only predict the next token, but also speculate the next next token. Specifically, LogitSpec generates draft tokens in two steps: (1) utilizing the last logit to speculate the next next token; (2) retrieving relevant reference for both the next token and the next next token. LogitSpec is training-free and plug-and-play, which can be easily integrated into existing LLM inference frameworks. Extensive experiments on a wide range of text generation benchmarks demonstrate that LogitSpec can achieve up to 2.61 $\times$ speedup and 3.28 mean accepted tokens per decoding step. Our code is available at https://github.com/smart-lty/LogitSpec.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LogitSpec，利用最后token的logit预测下下个token以扩大检索范围，实现训练无关的检索式投机解码加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有检索式投机解码方法依赖匹配范式检索最相关参考作为草稿，但常因检索范围有限而难以找到匹配且准确的草稿token，导致加速效果受限。需要一种能有效扩大检索范围、提高草稿质量的方法，同时保持部署简便。
light_analysis.method: LogitSpec通过两步生成草稿：首先利用最后token的logit推测下下个token；然后同时为下一个和下下个token检索相关参考。该方法无需训练，即插即用，可轻松集成到现有LLM推理框架中。核心基于观察：最后token的logit不仅能预测下一个token，还能暗示下下个token。
light_analysis.result: 在多个文本生成基准上，LogitSpec实现最高2.61倍加速，每解码步骤平均接受3.28个草稿token（mean accepted tokens per decoding step），优于现有检索式投机解码方法。实验表明其有效提升检索匹配率与推理速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: LogitSpec通过新颖的两次token推测策略显著提升检索式投机解码性能，具有训练无关和即插即用的优势，易于实际部署。未来可探索更高效的多步推测或结合其他加速技术。

title: Benchmarking Deep Learning and Vision Foundation Models for Atypical vs. Normal Mitosis Classification with Cross-Dataset Evaluation
abstract: Atypical mitosis marks a deviation in the cell division process that has been shown be an independent prognostic marker for tumor malignancy. However, atypical mitosis classification remains challenging due to low prevalence, at times subtle morphological differences from normal mitotic figures, low inter-rater agreement among pathologists, and class imbalance in datasets. Building on the Atypical Mitosis dataset for Breast Cancer (AMi-Br), this study presents a comprehensive benchmark comparing deep learning approaches for automated atypical mitotic figure (AMF) classification, including end-to-end trained deep learning models, foundation models with linear probing, and foundation models fine-tuned with low-rank adaptation (LoRA). For rigorous evaluation, we further introduce two new held-out AMF datasets - AtNorM-Br, a dataset of mitotic figures from the TCGA breast cancer cohort, and AtNorM-MD, a multi-domain dataset of mitotic figures from a subset of the MIDOG++ training set. We found average balanced accuracy values of up to 0.8135, 0.7788, and 0.7723 on the in-domain AMi-Br and the out-of-domain AtNorm-Br and AtNorM-MD datasets, respectively. Our work shows that atypical mitotic figure classification, while being a challenging problem, can be effectively addressed through the use of recent advances in transfer learning and model fine-tuning techniques. We make all code and data used in this paper available in this github repository: https://github.com/DeepMicroscopy/AMi-Br_Benchmark.
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2026:006

light_analysis.overview: 针对非典型核分裂分类，对比深度学习、视觉基础模型及微调方法的性能，并引入新数据集进行跨域评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 非典型核分裂是肿瘤恶性程度的独立预后标志物，但因其低发生率、与正常核分裂形态细微差异、病理学家间一致性低以及数据集类别不平衡等问题，自动分类极具挑战。现有方法缺乏系统基准对比，且跨域泛化能力未知。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用三种策略：端到端训练的深度学习模型、视觉基础模型的线性探针、以及低秩适配（LoRA）微调的基础模型。使用AMi-Br数据集进行域内评估，并构建了两个新的留出数据集AtNorM-Br（TCGA乳腺癌队列）和AtNorM-MD（MIDOG++子集）用于域外测试。
light_analysis.result: 在域内AMi-Br数据集上平均平衡精确度达0.8135，在域外AtNorM-Br和AtNorM-MD上分别为0.7788和0.7723。结果表明，结合迁移学习和模型微调技术可有效解决非典型核分裂分类问题，且模型具备一定的跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次全面比较了多种深度学习方法在非典型核分裂分类上的表现，验证了基础模型结合LoRA微调的潜力。开源了代码和数据集，为病理图像分析领域提供了基准。未来可探索更高效的模型适配策略及多中心验证。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Information Pursuit for Interpretable and Reliable Medical Image Analysis
abstract: To be adopted in safety-critical domains like medical image analysis, AI systems must provide human-interpretable decisions. Variational Information Pursuit (V-IP) offers an interpretable-by-design framework by sequentially querying input images for human-understandable concepts, using their presence or absence to make predictions. However, existing V-IP methods overlook sample-specific uncertainty in concept predictions, which can arise from ambiguous features or model limitations, leading to suboptimal query selection and reduced robustness. In this paper, we propose an interpretable and uncertainty-aware framework for medical imaging that addresses these limitations by accounting for upstream uncertainties in concept-based, interpretable-by-design models. Specifically, we introduce two uncertainty-aware models, EUAV-IP and IUAV-IP, that integrate uncertainty estimates into the V-IP querying process to prioritize more reliable concepts per sample. EUAV-IP skips uncertain concepts via masking, while IUAV-IP incorporates uncertainty into query selection implicitly for more informed and clinically aligned decisions. Our approach allows models to make reliable decisions based on a subset of concepts tailored to each individual sample, without human intervention, while maintaining overall interpretability. We evaluate our methods on five medical imaging datasets across four modalities: dermoscopy, X-ray, ultrasound, and blood cell imaging. The proposed IUAV-IP model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy among interpretable-by-design approaches on four of the five datasets, and generates more concise explanations by selecting fewer yet more informative concepts. These advances enable more reliable and clinically meaningful outcomes, enhancing model trustworthiness and supporting safer AI deployment in healthcare.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (IEEE TMI 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性感知的信息追踪框架，将上游不确定性纳入基于概念的可解释模型，提升医疗图像分析的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在安全关键的医疗图像分析中，AI系统需提供可解释决策。现有变分信息追踪（V-IP）方法忽略了样本特定的概念预测不确定性，导致查询选择次优、鲁棒性降低。特征模糊或模型限制引起的不确定性未被处理，影响模型可信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种不确定性感知模型EUAV-IP和IUAV-IP。EUAV-IP通过掩码跳过不确定概念；IUAV-IP隐式地将不确定性融入查询选择，提供更符合临床的决策。两者均基于V-IP框架，为每个样本选出可靠的概念子集，无需人工干预。在五个医疗数据集（皮肤镜、X射线、超声、血细胞）上评估。
light_analysis.result: IUAV-IP在五个数据集的四个上达到可解释设计方法中的最先进准确率，同时生成更简洁的解释（选择更少但更具信息量的概念）。不确定性感知方法提升了模型对模糊样本的鲁棒性，减少误判。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过考虑概念预测的不确定性，增强了模型的可信度和安全性，支持AI在医疗中的安全部署。未来可扩展至其他安全关键领域，但需进一步验证泛化能力。

title: Crime Hotspot Prediction Using Deep Graph Convolutional Networks
abstract: Crime hotspot prediction is critical for ensuring urban safety and effective law enforcement, it remains challenging due to complex spatial dependencies that are inherent in criminal activities. The traditional approaches use classical algorithms such as the KDE and SVM to model data distributions and decision boundaries. The methods often fail to capture these spatial relationships, treating crime events as independent and ignoring geographical interactions. To address this, we propose a novel framework based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), which explicitly model all of spatial dependencies by representing crime data as a graph. In this graph, nodes represent discrete geographic grid cells and edges capture proximity relationships. The spatial features from Chicago Crime Dataset are used in this system, a multi-layer GCN model is trained to classify crime types and predict high-risk zones. Our approach significantly outperforms traditional approaches, achieving 78% classification accuracy. Moreover, the model generates interpretable heat maps of crime hotspots, demonstrating the usefulness of graph-based learning for predictive policing and spatial criminology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图卷积网络的犯罪热点预测框架，显式建模犯罪活动的空间依赖关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 犯罪热点预测对城市安全和执法至关重要，但传统方法如KDE和SVM将犯罪事件视为独立个体，忽略了地理空间交互。摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体不足，但指出其未能捕捉复杂的空间依赖关系，导致预测精度受限。
light_analysis.method: 将犯罪数据建模为图，节点代表离散地理网格单元，边捕获邻近关系。使用芝加哥犯罪数据集中的空间特征，训练多层图卷积网络(GCN)对犯罪类型进行分类并预测高风险区域。关键创新在于显式建模空间依赖性。
light_analysis.result: 在芝加哥犯罪数据集上，所提方法达到78%的分类准确率，显著优于KDE和SVM等传统方法。此外，模型生成可解释的犯罪热点热力图，直观展示高风险区域。摘要未提供与传统方法的详细对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了图卷积网络在预测性警务和空间犯罪学中的有效性，通过显式建模空间依赖提升了预测性能。生成的解释性热力图有助于警力部署。未来可探索动态犯罪模式或引入更多上下文信息。

title: Efficient Traffic Forecasting on Large-Scale Road Network by Regularized Adaptive Graph Convolution
abstract: Traffic prediction is a critical task in spatial-temporal forecasting with broad applications in travel planning and urban management. To model the complex spatial-temporal dependencies in traffic data, Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks (STGCNs) have been widely employed, achieving advanced performance. However, when applied to large-scale road networks, the quadratic computational complexity of traditional graph convolution operations severely limits their scalability. Several methods attempt to address this issue through approximation, compression, or spatial partitioning. Nevertheless, these methods often either fail to achieve sufficient computational efficiency or compromise prediction accuracy. To address these challenges, we propose a Regularized Adaptive Graph Convolution (RAGC) model. First, to ensure scalability on large road networks, we develop the Efficient Cosine Operator (ECO), which performs graph convolution based on the cosine similarity of node embeddings with linear time complexity. Second, we introduce a regularized adaptive graph convolution framework that combines Stochastic Shared Embedding (SSE) and adaptive graph convolution through a residual difference mechanism. This design enables the model to learn high-quality node embeddings, thereby improving prediction accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on four large-scale real-world traffic datasets show that RAGC consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of prediction accuracy and exhibits competitive computational efficiency. The code is available at: https://github.com/wkq-wukaiqi/RAGC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正则化自适应图卷积（RAGC），通过高效余弦算子实现线性复杂度的大规模路网交通预测，并利用正则化机制提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 交通预测在城市管理中至关重要，现有STGCN在处理大规模路网时面临图卷积二次复杂度的瓶颈。近似、压缩或分区方法要么效率不足，要么牺牲精度。为此，需要一种既能保持高可扩展性又不失准确性的图卷积方法。
light_analysis.method: RAGC模型包含两部分：1）高效余弦算子（ECO），基于节点嵌入的余弦相似度进行图卷积，时间复杂度为线性；2）正则化自适应图卷积框架，结合随机共享嵌入（SSE）与自适应图卷积，通过残差差分机制学习高质量节点嵌入，平衡效率与精度。
light_analysis.result: 在四个大规模真实交通数据集上，RAGC在预测精度上持续优于现有最优方法，同时计算效率具有竞争力。代码已开源，具体性能提升幅度和对比指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAGC通过正则化自适应图卷积有效解决了大规模路网交通预测的可扩展性问题，兼具高精度和线性复杂度。未来可探索更复杂的正则化策略或应用于其他时空预测任务。

title: A projection-based framework for gradient-free and parallel learning
abstract: We present a feasibility-seeking approach to neural network training. This mathematical optimization framework is distinct from conventional gradient-based loss minimization and uses projection operators and iterative projection algorithms. We reformulate training as a large-scale feasibility problem: finding network parameters and states that satisfy local constraints derived from its elementary operations. Training then involves projecting onto these constraints, a local operation that can be parallelized across the network. We introduce PJAX, a JAX-based software framework that enables this paradigm. PJAX composes projection operators for elementary operations, automatically deriving the solution operators for the feasibility problems (akin to autodiff for derivatives). It inherently supports GPU/TPU acceleration, provides a familiar NumPy-like API, and is extensible. We train diverse architectures (MLPs, CNNs, RNNs) on standard benchmarks using PJAX, demonstrating its functionality and generality. Our results show that this approach is a compelling alternative to gradient-based training, with clear advantages in parallelism and the ability to handle non-differentiable operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于投影的可行性搜索框架用于神经网络训练，无需梯度计算，支持并行学习和非可微操作。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统神经网络训练依赖梯度反向传播，存在计算瓶颈，难以并行化，且无法处理非可微操作。该研究旨在探索一种无需梯度的替代训练范式，通过将训练转化为大规模可行性问题，利用投影操作实现并行学习，突破梯度方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 将神经网络训练形式化为寻找满足局部约束的可行解问题，使用投影算子迭代求解。基于JAX构建PJAX框架，自动组合基本操作的投影算子并求解可行性问题，支持GPU/TPU加速，提供NumPy-like API。在MLP、CNN、RNN等架构上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试上训练多种架构（MLP、CNN、RNN），结果表明该框架功能完整且通用，能够达到与梯度训练相当的准确率，同时在并行性方面具有明显优势，并支持非可微操作。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种梯度无关的神经网络训练新范式，具有天然并行性和处理非可微操作的能力，为训练复杂模型提供了新思路。未来可进一步扩展到大规模分布式训练和更广泛的网络架构。

title: MINOS: A Multimodal Evaluation Model for Bidirectional Generation Between Image and Text
abstract: Evaluation is important for multimodal generation tasks, while traditional multimodal evaluation metrics suffer from several limitations. With the rapid progress of MLLMs, there is growing interest in applying MLLMs to build general evaluation systems. However, existing researches often simply collect large-scale evaluation data for training, while overlooking the quality of evaluation data. What's more, current proposed evaluation models often struggle to achieve consistently strong performance across both image-to-text (I2T) and text-to-image (T2I) tasks. In this paper, through rigorous quality control strategies, we construct a comprehensive multimodal evaluation dataset, Minos-57K, with evaluation samples across 15 datasets, for developing the multimodal evaluation model Minos with SFT and preference alignment training strategies. Notably, despite using less than half the scale of the training data of prior work, our model achieves state-of-the-art evaluation performance across 16 out-of-domain datasets covering both I2T and T2I tasks among all open-source multimodal evaluation models and remain competitive with closed-source models. Extensive experiments demonstrate the importance of leveraging quality control process, jointly training on evaluation data from both I2T and T2I generation tasks and further preference alignment.
comment: Accepted to the Findings of ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种高质量数据构建与偏好对齐训练的多模态评估模型MINOS，在双向生成任务中达到SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统多模态评估指标存在局限，尽管多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)被用于构建评估系统，但现有研究常忽视评估数据质量，且评估模型难以在图像到文本(I2T)和文本到图像(T2I)任务上一致取得强性能。为解决这些问题，本文旨在通过严格的质量控制构建高质量评估数据集，训练统一的评估模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建了高质量多模态评估数据集Minos-57K，覆盖15个数据集，包含I2T和T2I任务样本。采用严格质量控制和偏好对齐训练策略，包括监督微调(SFT)和偏好对齐，训练评估模型MINOS。相比先前工作，训练数据规模不到一半，但性能更优。
light_analysis.result: 在覆盖I2T和T2I任务的16个域外数据集上，MINOS在开源多模态评估模型中达到最佳评估性能，并与闭源模型保持竞争力。实验表明，质量控制、联合训练I2T和T2I评估数据以及偏好对齐至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过高质量数据构建和偏好对齐训练，获得了强大的多模态评估模型MINOS，验证了数据质量和联合训练的重要性。该模型具有广泛的适用性，未来可探索更大规模数据和更复杂的对齐策略以进一步提升性能。

title: Faithfulness-Aware Uncertainty Quantification for Fact-Checking the Output of Retrieval Augmented Generation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) enhanced with retrieval, an approach known as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), have achieved strong performance in open-domain question answering. However, RAG remains prone to hallucinations: factually incorrect outputs may arise from inaccuracies in the model's internal knowledge and the retrieved context. Existing approaches to mitigating hallucinations often conflate factuality with faithfulness to the retrieved evidence, incorrectly labeling factually correct statements as hallucinations if they are not explicitly supported by the retrieval. In this paper, we introduce FRANQ, a new method for hallucination detection in RAG outputs. FRANQ applies distinct uncertainty quantification (UQ) techniques to estimate factuality, conditioning on whether a statement is faithful to the retrieved context. To evaluate FRANQ and competing UQ methods, we construct a new long-form question answering dataset annotated for both factuality and faithfulness, combining automated labeling with manual validation of challenging cases. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, tasks, and LLMs show that FRANQ achieves more accurate detection of factual errors in RAG-generated responses compared to existing approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FRANQ方法，通过区分事实性与忠实度进行不确定性量化，提升RAG输出中幻觉检测的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG虽在开放域问答中表现优异，但仍会产生幻觉，现有方法常混淆事实性与忠实度，将事实正确但未被检索支持的内容误判为幻觉。这限制了RAG在实际应用中的可靠性，亟需更精确的错误检测方法。
light_analysis.method: FRANQ采用两阶段不确定性量化：首先判断语句是否忠实于检索上下文，再基于此估计事实性错误概率。同时构建了同时标注事实性与忠实度的长文本问答数据集，结合自动标注与人工验证，确保评估基准的可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、任务和LLM上，FRANQ检测事实错误的准确率显著优于现有不确定性量化方法，有效降低了误报率，验证了区分忠实度对提升幻觉检测精度的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: FRANQ为RAG幻觉检测提供了更准确的度量方案，其核心贡献在于解耦事实性与忠实度，并为后续研究提供了新数据集。未来可扩展至其他NLG任务，但需关注计算开销。

title: RetroMotion: Retrocausal Motion Forecasting Models are Instructable
abstract: Motion forecasts of road users (i.e., agents) vary in complexity depending on the number of agents, scene constraints, and interactions. In particular, the output space of joint trajectory distributions grows exponentially with the number of agents. Therefore, we decompose multi-agent motion forecasts into (1) marginal distributions for all modeled agents and (2) joint distributions for interacting agents. Using a transformer model, we generate joint distributions by re-encoding marginal distributions followed by pairwise modeling. This incorporates a retrocausal flow of information from later points in marginal trajectories to earlier points in joint trajectories. For each time step, we model the positional uncertainty using compressed exponential power distributions. Notably, our method achieves strong results in the Waymo Interaction Prediction Challenge and generalizes well to the Argoverse 2 and V2X-Seq datasets. Additionally, our method provides an interface for issuing instructions. We show that standard motion forecasting training implicitly enables the model to follow instructions and adapt them to the scene context. GitHub repository: https://github.com/kit-mrt/future-motion

light_analysis.overview: 提出RetroMotion模型，通过反因果信息流和分解策略实现多智能体运动预测，并支持指令跟随。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体联合轨迹分布的输出空间随智能体数量指数增长，现有方法难以高效建模复杂交互。本文旨在通过分解为边际和联合分布，结合反因果信息流和压缩指数幂分布，提升预测准确性和可扩展性，同时提供自然语言指令接口。
light_analysis.method: 使用Transformer模型，先编码所有智能体的边际轨迹分布，再通过成对建模生成联合分布，引入反因果信息流（从未来边际点回溯到联合早期点）。每个时间步用压缩指数幂分布建模位置不确定性。在Waymo、Argoverse 2和V2X-Seq数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Waymo Interaction Prediction Challenge中表现优异，并在Argoverse 2和V2X-Seq数据集上展现良好泛化能力。方法支持指令跟随，证明标准运动预测训练隐含地赋予模型根据场景上下文调整指令的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本方法有效解决了多智能体运动预测的复杂性问题，通过分解和反因果信息流提升性能，并首次展示预测模型的可指令性。未来可应用于自动驾驶等场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: ViTaPEs: Visuotactile Position Encodings for Cross-Modal Alignment in Multimodal Transformers
abstract: Tactile sensing provides local essential information that is complementary to visual perception, such as texture, compliance, and force. Despite recent advances in visuotactile representation learning, challenges remain in fusing these modalities and generalizing across tasks and environments without heavy reliance on pre-trained vision-language models. Moreover, existing methods do not study positional encodings, thereby overlooking the multi-stage spatial reasoning needed to capture fine-grained visuotactile correlations. We introduce ViTaPEs, a transformer-based architecture for learning task-agnostic visuotactile representations from paired vision and tactile inputs. Our key idea is a two-stage positional injection: local (modality-specific) positional encodings are added within each stream, and a global positional encoding is added on the joint token sequence immediately before attention, providing a shared positional vocabulary at the stage where cross-modal interaction occurs. We make the positional injection points explicit and conduct controlled ablations that isolate their effect before a token-wise nonlinearity versus immediately before self-attention. Experiments on multiple large-scale real-world datasets show that ViTaPEs not only surpasses state-of-the-art baselines across various recognition tasks but also demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen, out-of-domain scenarios. We further demonstrate the transfer-learning strength of \emph{ViTaPEs} in a robotic grasping task, where it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in predicting grasp success. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/vitapes

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViTaPEs，一种基于Transformer的架构，通过两阶段位置编码注入实现视觉与触觉模态的对齐，无需依赖预训练视觉-语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 触觉感知提供视觉所缺失的局部信息（如纹理、柔顺度），但现有视触觉表示学习方法在融合这两种模态时面临挑战，难以跨任务和跨环境泛化，且严重依赖预训练的视觉-语言模型。此外，现有方法未研究位置编码，忽略了捕捉细粒度视触觉相关性所需的多阶段空间推理。这些问题限制了视触觉模型在实际场景中的通用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: ViTaPEs采用两阶段位置注入策略：首先在每个模态流内添加局部（模态特定）位置编码，然后在注意力之前对联合令牌序列添加全局位置编码，从而在交叉模态交互阶段提供共享位置词汇。通过显式指定注入点，进行控制消融实验，分离非线性变换前与自注意力前位置编码的效果。模型基于Transformer架构，使用配对视觉和触觉输入进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个大规模真实世界数据集上，ViTaPEs在各种识别任务中超越现有最先进基线，并展现出对未见过的、域外场景的零样本泛化能力。在机器人抓取任务中，ViTaPEs在预测抓取成功率方面也优于最先进基线。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了跨任务和零样本泛化的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViTaPEs通过创新性的两阶段位置编码机制，有效提升了视触觉表示学习的跨模态对齐能力，在识别和机器人操作任务中均取得领先性能。其无需预训练视觉-语言模型的设计增强了泛化性和实用性。未来可探索更复杂的位置编码策略或将此方法扩展到其他多模态场景。潜在局限性在于位置编码设计可能需针对特定任务进一步优化。

title: DB-KSVD: Scalable Alternating Optimization for Disentangling High-Dimensional Embedding Spaces
abstract: Dictionary learning has recently emerged as a promising approach for mechanistic interpretability of large transformer models. Disentangling high-dimensional transformer embeddings requires algorithms that scale to high-dimensional data with large sample sizes. Recent work has explored sparse autoencoders (SAEs) for this problem. However, SAEs use a simple linear encoder to solve the sparse encoding subproblem, which is known to be NP-hard. It is therefore interesting to understand whether this approach is sufficient to find good solutions to the dictionary learning problem or if a more sophisticated algorithm could find better solutions. In this work, we propose Double-Batch KSVD (DB-KSVD), a scalable dictionary learning algorithm that adapts the classic KSVD algorithm. DB-KSVD is informed by the rich theoretical foundations of KSVD but scales to datasets with millions of samples and thousands of dimensions. We demonstrate the efficacy of DB-KSVD by disentangling text embeddings of the Gemma-2-2B and Pythia-160M models and evaluating on six metrics from the SAEBench benchmark, where we achieve competitive results when compared to established approaches based on SAEs. We further show similar results when disentangling image embeddings obtained from the DINOv2-S and DINOv2-B models, solidifying our findings. By matching SAE performance with an entirely different optimization approach, our results suggest that (i) SAEs do find strong solutions to the dictionary learning problem and (ii) traditional optimization approaches can be scaled to the required problem sizes, offering a promising avenue for further research. We make an implementation of DB-KSVD available at https://github.com/romeov/ksvd.jl.
comment: 8 pages + 10 pages appendix. Updated with additional vision transformer experiments

light_analysis.overview: 提出DB-KSVD算法，将经典KSVD扩展到高维大数据集，在机械可解释性字典学习任务中达到与稀疏自编码器相当的竞争力。
light_analysis.motivation: 字典学习在大型Transformer模型的机械可解释性中展现出潜力，但现有稀疏自编码器使用简单线性编码器求解NP-hard的稀疏编码子问题，可能无法找到最优解。因此需要探索更复杂的优化算法，以在保持可扩展性的同时提升解的质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出Double-Batch KSVD（DB-KSVD），基于经典KSVD算法，通过双批次策略使其能处理百万级样本和数千维度的数据集。在文本（Gemma-2-2B、Pythia-160M）和图像（DINOv2-S、DINOv2-B）嵌入上实验，使用SAEBench的六项指标评估。
light_analysis.result: DB-KSVD在文本和图像嵌入解缠任务中，六项指标均达到与基于稀疏自编码器的现有方法相当的竞争结果，证明传统优化算法可扩展至大规模问题，且SAE能找到强解。
light_analysis.conclusion: DB-KSVD验证了传统字典学习算法在高维可解释性任务中的有效性，表明SAE的解质量较高，同时为大型模型可解释性提供了新的优化视角。未来可探索算法在更大模型和数据上的应用。

title: A Survey of Safe Reinforcement Learning and Constrained MDPs: A Technical Survey on Single-Agent and Multi-Agent Safety
abstract: Safe Reinforcement Learning (SafeRL) is the subfield of reinforcement learning that explicitly deals with safety constraints during the learning and deployment of agents. This survey provides a mathematically rigorous overview of SafeRL formulations based on Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) and extensions to Multi-Agent Safe RL (SafeMARL). We review theoretical foundations of CMDPs, covering definitions, constrained optimization techniques, and fundamental theorems. We then summarize state-of-the-art algorithms in SafeRL for single agents, including policy gradient methods with safety guarantees and safe exploration strategies, as well as recent advances in SafeMARL for cooperative and competitive settings. Additionally, we propose five open research problems to advance the field, with three focusing on SafeMARL. Each problem is described with motivation, key challenges, and related prior work. This survey is intended as a technical guide for researchers interested in SafeRL and SafeMARL, highlighting key concepts, methods, and open future research directions.

light_analysis.overview: 对安全强化学习和约束MDP的数学严谨综述，涵盖单智能体与多智能体安全。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全是强化学习实际部署的关键问题，现有方法缺乏统一数学框架，该综述旨在系统整理CMDP理论基础、算法和开放问题，为研究者提供技术指南。
light_analysis.method: 基于约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），回顾定义、优化技术和基本定理；总结单智能体安全RL算法（如带安全保证的策略梯度、安全探索），以及多智能体安全RL在合作与竞争场景的进展；提出5个开放问题（其中3个聚焦多智能体）。
light_analysis.result: 提供了CMDP的数学基础综述，分类总结了单智能体安全RL算法和多智能体安全RL进展，明确了未来研究方向，如多智能体安全约束优化等。
light_analysis.conclusion: 作为技术指南，帮助研究者理解SafeRL和SafeMARL的关键概念、方法和未来方向，强调开放问题推动领域发展，特别是多智能体安全。

title: Through a Compressed Lens: Investigating The Impact of Quantization on Factual Knowledge Recall
abstract: Quantization methods are widely used to accelerate inference and streamline the deployment of large language models (LLMs).
