Although quantization's effects on various LLM capabilities have been extensively studied, one critical area remains underexplored: factual knowledge recall (FKR), the process by which LLMs access stored knowledge. To this end, we conduct comprehensive experiments using three common quantization techniques at distinct bit widths, in conjunction with interpretability-driven analyses on two tasks, knowledge memorization and latent multi-hop reasoning. We show that quantization typically results in information loss within LLMs, consequently diminishing their capacity for FKR. This effect is particularly amplified in smaller models within the same architectural families. However, models quantized at reduced bit precision do not consistently exhibit inferior performance and occasionally quantization may even enhance model FKR. We find that BitSandBytes demonstrates highest preservation of the original full-precision model's FKR. Despite variability across models and methods, quantization causes modest performance degradation and remains an effective compression strategy.

light_analysis.overview: 研究量化对大型语言模型事实知识召回的影响，发现量化通常导致信息损失，但偶尔可增强召回，其中BitSandBytes方法保留最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化广泛用于加速大型语言模型部署，但其对事实知识召回这一关键能力的影响尚未被充分研究。事实知识召回是模型访问存储知识的过程，现有工作多关注量化对其他能力的影响，忽视了这一领域。因此，有必要系统探究量化如何影响模型的事实知识召回能力。
light_analysis.method: 使用三种常见量化技术（如对称、非对称量化）在不同位宽下进行实验，结合可解释性分析方法，在知识记忆和潜在多跳推理两个任务上评估。分析涵盖不同架构家族和模型规模，比较量化前后模型的事实知识召回性能变化。
light_analysis.result: 量化通常导致信息损失，降低事实知识召回能力，该效应在较小模型中更明显。但低位宽量化并非总表现更差，有时反而增强召回。BitSandBytes方法对原始全精度模型的事实知识召回保留最佳。总体性能下降适度，量化仍是有效压缩策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 量化对事实知识召回的影响复杂，并非单调递减。BitSandBytes方法表现出色，未来可探索缓解信息损失的量化方案。该研究为量化在知识密集型任务中的应用提供了指导，强调需权衡压缩效率与知识保留。

title: A Survey on the Safety and Security Threats of Computer-Using Agents: JARVIS or Ultron?
abstract: Recently, AI-driven interactions with computing devices have advanced from basic prototype tools to sophisticated, LLM-based systems that emulate human-like operations in graphical user interfaces. We are now witnessing the emergence of \emph{Computer-Using Agents} (CUAs), capable of autonomously performing tasks such as navigating desktop applications, web pages, and mobile apps. However, as these agents grow in capability, they also introduce novel safety and security risks. Vulnerabilities in LLM-driven reasoning, with the added complexity of integrating multiple software components and multimodal inputs, further complicate the security landscape. In this paper, we present a systematization of knowledge on the safety and security threats of CUAs. We conduct a comprehensive literature review and distill our findings along four research objectives: \textit{\textbf{(i)}} define the CUA that suits safety analysis; \textit{\textbf{(ii)} } categorize current safety threats among CUAs; \textit{\textbf{(iii)}} propose a comprehensive taxonomy of existing defensive strategies; \textit{\textbf{(iv)}} summarize prevailing benchmarks, datasets, and evaluation metrics used to assess the safety and performance of CUAs. Building on these insights, our work provides future researchers with a structured foundation for exploring unexplored vulnerabilities and offers practitioners actionable guidance in designing and deploying secure Computer-Using Agents.

light_analysis.overview: 系统化整理了计算机使用代理（CUA）的安全与安全威胁，提出了威胁分类、防御策略和评估基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLM驱动的CUA能力增强，其自主操作任务带来新的安全风险，尤其是LLM推理漏洞和多模态输入集成增加了安全复杂性。现有研究缺乏对该领域安全威胁的系统化认知，亟需整理知识并指导实践。
light_analysis.method: 通过全面文献综述，沿四个目标展开：定义适合安全分析的CUA、分类当前安全威胁、提出防御策略的完整分类、总结评估CUA安全与性能的基准、数据集和指标。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，但构建了系统化知识框架，包括威胁分类、防御策略分类和评估指标体系，为未来研究提供结构化基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为研究者提供了探索未发现漏洞的结构化基础，为从业者提供了设计和部署安全CUA的可行指导。尚未探讨具体威胁实例，需后续工作补充。

title: Compton Form Factor Extraction using Quantum Deep Neural Networks
abstract: We extract Compton form factors (CFFs) from deeply virtual Compton scattering measurements at the Thomas Jefferson National Accelerator Facility (JLab) using quantum-inspired deep neural networks (QDNNs). The analysis implements the twist-2 Belitsky-Kirchner-Müller formalism and employs a fitting strategy that emulates standard local fits. Using pseudodata, we benchmark QDNNs against classical deep neural networks (CDNNs) and find that QDNNs often deliver higher predictive accuracy and tighter uncertainties at comparable model complexity. Guided by these results, we introduce a quantitative selection metric that indicates when QDNNs or CDNNs are optimal for a given experimental fit. After obtaining local extractions from the JLab data, we perform a standard neural-network global CFF fit and compare with previous global analyses. The results support QDNNs as an efficient and complementary tool to CDNNs for CFF determination and for future multidimensional studies of parton distributions and hadronic structure.
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures. v4: matches published version

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用量子深度神经网络从深度虚康普顿散射数据中提取Compton形状因子，与经典网络相比具更高精度和更紧不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: Compton形状因子（CFFs）的精确提取对于理解核子内禀结构至关重要。现有经典深度神经网络方法在精度和不确定性控制上存在局限，且多维部分子分布研究需要更高效的工具。量子启发式神经网络可能在特定问题中提供更优性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用twist-2 Belitsky-Kirchner-Müller形式化，构建量子深度神经网络（QDNN）拟合策略，模拟标准局域拟合。使用Jefferson实验室的赝数据作为基准，将QDNN与经典深度神经网络（CDNN）对比，并通过定量选择指标确定最优方法。最终对实验数据进行局域提取并进行全局神经网络拟合。
light_analysis.result: 在赝数据实验中，QDNN在类似模型复杂度下通常比CDNN具有更高的预测精度和更紧的不确定性。基于此提出选择指标。从JLab数据获得局域提取后，进行全局CFF拟合，结果与先前全局分析一致，证实QDNN作为CDNN补充工具的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 量子深度神经网络为CFF提取提供了高效互补方案，尤其适用于未来多维部分子分布和强子结构研究。其高精度和紧不确定性优势有助于提升核子结构描述的准确性。局限性暂未提及，但依赖实验数据质量。

title: Improving Bayesian Optimization for Portfolio Management with an Adaptive Scheduling
abstract: Existing black-box portfolio management systems are prevalent in the financial industry due to commercial and safety constraints, though their performance can fluctuate dramatically with changing market regimes. Evaluating these non-transparent systems is computationally expensive, as fixed budgets limit the number of possible observations. Therefore, achieving stable and sample-efficient optimization for these systems has become a critical challenge. This work presents a novel Bayesian optimization framework (TPE-AS) that improves search stability and efficiency for black-box portfolio models under these limited observation budgets. Standard Bayesian optimization, which solely maximizes expected return, can yield erratic search trajectories and misalign the surrogate model with the true objective, thereby wasting the limited evaluation budget. To mitigate these issues, we propose a weighted Lagrangian estimator that leverages an adaptive schedule and importance sampling. This estimator dynamically balances exploration and exploitation by incorporating both the maximization of model performance and the minimization of the variance of model observations. It guides the search from broad, performance-seeking exploration towards stable and desirable regions as the optimization progresses. Extensive experiments and ablation studies, which establish our proposed method as the primary approach and other configurations as baselines, demonstrate its effectiveness across four backtest settings with three distinct black-box portfolio management models.
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures; version of record. ICAAI 2025, 9th International Conference on Advances in Artificial Intelligence (ICAAI 2025), November 14-16, 2025, Manchester, United Kingdom. ACM, New York, NY, USA, pages 21-25. Version 4, code repository added: https://github.com/pixelhero98/TPE-AS

light_analysis.overview: 提出TPE-AS框架，通过自适应调度的加权拉格朗日估计器改进贝叶斯优化，实现黑盒投资组合模型的稳定高效优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有黑盒投资组合管理系统性能随市场变化波动大，且评估昂贵、样本有限。标准贝叶斯优化仅最大化预期收益，导致搜索轨迹不稳定，浪费评估预算。因此需要稳定且样本高效的优化方法，以在有限预算下提升搜索稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出TPE-AS框架，核心是加权拉格朗日估计器，结合自适应调度和重要性采样。该估计器动态平衡探索与利用，同时最大化模型性能和最小化观测方差，引导搜索从广泛探索转向稳定区域。通过自适应调度调整探索-利用权重，提高样本效率。
light_analysis.result: 在四个回测设置下，使用三种不同黑盒投资组合模型进行实验，将所提方法作为主要方案，其他配置作为基线。实验和消融研究证明了TPE-AS的有效性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标或对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了TPE-AS框架，提升了黑盒投资组合模型在有限预算下的优化稳定性和效率，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的市场条件和自适应机制，以进一步增强鲁棒性。

title: FLARE: Fully Integration of Vision-Language Representations for Deep Cross-Modal Understanding
abstract: We introduce FLARE, a family of vision language models (VLMs) with a fully vision-language alignment and integration paradigm. Unlike existing approaches that rely on single MLP projectors for modality alignment and defer cross-modal interaction to LLM decoding, FLARE achieves deep, dynamic integration throughout the pipeline. Our key contributions include: (1) Text-Guided Vision Encoding that incorporates textual information during vision encoding to achieve pixel-level alignment; (2) Context-Aware Alignment Decoding that aggregates visual features conditioned on textual context during decoding for query-level integration; (3) Dual-Semantic Mapping Loss to supervise feature mapping from both modalities and enable modality-level bridging; and (4) Text-Driven VQA Synthesis that leverages high-quality text to generate VQA pairs and synthesize corresponding images, enabling data-level optimization. We train FLARE at 3B and 8B scales under both fixed and dynamic resolution settings, demonstrating that our full-modality alignment significantly outperforms existing methods while maintaining strong generalizability. FLARE 3B surpasses Cambrian-1 8B and Florence-VL 8B using only 630 vision tokens. Ablation studies reveal that FLARE achieves superior performance over existing methods with minimal computational cost. Even without dynamic resolution, FLARE outperforms LLaVA-NeXT, validating the effectiveness of our approach. We release our code, model weights, and dataset in https://github.com/starriver030515/FLARE.

light_analysis.overview: FLARE提出了一种完全视觉语言对齐与融合的范式，通过四个创新组件实现深度动态跨模态理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型依赖单MLP投射器进行模态对齐，跨模态交互仅发生在LLM解码阶段，导致视觉和语言信息融合不充分。这种浅层对齐限制了模型对细粒度语义关系的理解能力。FLARE旨在解决此问题，通过全流程的深度集成提升多模态理解性能。
light_analysis.method: FLARE包含四大创新：1) 文本引导视觉编码，在视觉编码阶段融入文本信息实现像素级对齐；2) 上下文感知对齐解码，在解码时根据文本上下文聚合视觉特征实现查询级集成；3) 双语义映射损失，监督双模态特征映射并实现模态级桥接；4) 文本驱动VQA合成，利用高质量文本生成VQA对和对应图像实现数据级优化。模型在3B和8B规模下训练，支持固定和动态分辨率。
light_analysis.result: FLARE 3B仅用630个视觉令牌，在多个基准上超越Cambrian-1 8B和Florence-VL 8B。消融实验表明该方法以极低计算成本取得显著性能提升。即使不采用动态分辨率，FLARE仍优于LLaVA-NeXT，验证了全模态对齐策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLARE通过完全视觉语言对齐和融合范式，显著提升了跨模态理解能力，并在小模型上超越大模型。该工作开源了代码、模型和数据集，为多模态研究提供了新范式。未来可探索更大规模模型和更多模态的扩展。

title: TinyR1-32B-Preview: Boosting Accuracy with Branch-Merge Distillation
abstract: The challenge of reducing the size of Large Language Models (LLMs) while maintaining their performance has gained significant attention. However, existing methods, such as model distillation and transfer learning, often fail to achieve high accuracy. To address this limitation, we introduce the Branch-Merge distillation approach, which enhances model compression through two phases: (1) the Branch Phase, where knowledge from a large teacher model is \textit{selectively distilled} into specialized student models via domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT); And (2) the Merge Phase, where these student models are merged to enable cross-domain knowledge transfer and improve generalization. We validate our distillation approach using DeepSeek-R1 as the teacher and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B as the student. The resulting merged model, TinyR1-32B-Preview, outperforms its counterpart DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B across multiple benchmarks, including Mathematics (+5.5 points), Coding (+4.4 points) and Science (+2.9 points), while achieving near-equal performance to DeepSeek-R1 on AIME 2024. The Branch-Merge distillation approach provides a scalable solution for creating smaller, high-performing LLMs with reduced computational cost and time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Branch-Merge蒸馏方法，通过选择性蒸馏和跨域知识融合，在保持小模型高性能的同时实现模型压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型压缩时性能显著下降，现有蒸馏和迁移学习方法准确率不足，亟需高效的蒸馏策略以在减小模型规模的同时保持高精度。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段Branch-Merge蒸馏：分支阶段从教师模型（DeepSeek-R1）通过领域特定微调选择性蒸馏到多个专精学生模型；合并阶段将学生模型合并以促进跨域知识迁移和泛化，最终得到TinyR1-32B-Preview。
light_analysis.result: TinyR1-32B-Preview在数学（+5.5）、编码（+4.4）和科学（+2.9）基准上超越学生基线DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B，并在AIME 2024上达到与教师DeepSeek-R1几乎相同的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Branch-Merge蒸馏提供了可扩展的解决方案，在显著降低计算成本和时间的同时，创建高性能的小型LLM，其性能接近大型教师模型。

title: Is Human-Like Text Liked by Humans? Multilingual Human Detection and Preference Against AI
abstract: Prior studies have shown that distinguishing text generated by Large Language Models (LLMs) from human-written one is highly challenging for humans, and often no better than random guessing. To verify the generalizability of this finding across languages and domains, we perform an extensive case study to identify the upper bound of human detection accuracy. Across 16 datasets covering 9 languages and 9 domains, 19 annotators achieved an average detection accuracy of 87.6%, thus challenging previous conclusions. We find that major gaps between human and machine text lie in concreteness, cultural nuances, and diversity. Prompting by explicitly explaining the distinctions in the prompts can partially bridge the gaps in over 50% of the cases. However, we also find that humans do not always prefer human-written text, particularly when they cannot clearly identify its source. We release our dataset, the human labels, and the annotator metadata at https://github.com/xnlp-lab/HumanEval-MGT.

light_analysis.overview: 通过16个数据集、9种语言和9个领域的实验，发现人类检测AI文本的平均准确率高达87.6%，挑战了先前认为人类检测不优于随机猜测的结论。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究表明人类区分LLM生成文本与人类文本非常困难，准确率接近随机猜测。为了验证这一发现在不同语言和领域中的普适性，本研究进行了大规模案例研究，以确定人类检测准确率的上限。该问题对信息可信度、内容审核和AI伦理具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 研究涵盖9种语言、9个领域、16个数据集，由19名标注员进行人工检测。通过对比人类和机器文本，发现主要差距在于具体性、文化细微差异和多样性。使用提示工程明确解释这些差异，可在超过50%的情况下部分弥合差距。数据集和标注元数据已开源。
light_analysis.result: 平均检测准确率达87.6%，显著高于随机猜测，挑战了先前结论。人类并不总是偏好人类写的文本，尤其在无法明确判断来源时。研究提供了大规模多语言数据集，包含人类标签和标注员元数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究重新评估了人类检测AI文本的能力，发现准确率远高于先前认知，揭示了人机文本的关键差异（具体性、文化细微差异和多样性）。同时指出人类偏好并不必然倾向人类文本。该数据集为后续AI文本检测和偏好研究提供了宝贵资源，未来可探索提升检测性能和偏好机制。

title: ChinaTravel: An Open-Ended Travel Planning Benchmark with Compositional Constraint Validation for Language Agents
abstract: Travel planning stands out among real-world applications of \emph{Language Agents} because it couples significant practical demand with a rigorous constraint-satisfaction challenge. However, existing benchmarks primarily operate on a slot-filling paradigm, restricting agents to synthetic queries with pre-defined constraint menus, which fails to capture the open-ended nature of natural language interaction, where user requirements are compositional, diverse, and often implicitly expressed. To address this gap, we introduce \emph{ChinaTravel}, with four key contributions: 1) a practical sandbox aligned with the multi-day, multi-POI travel planning, 2) a compositionally generalizable domain-specific language (DSL) for scalable evaluation, covering feasibility, constraint satisfaction, and preference comparison 3) an open-ended dataset that integrates diverse travel requirements and implicit intent from 1154 human participants, and 4) fine-grained analysis reveal the potential of neuro-symbolic agents in travel planning, achieving a 37.0% constraint satisfaction rate on human queries, a 10 \times improvement over purely neural models, yet highlighting significant challenges in compositional generalization. Overall, ChinaTravel provides a foundation for advancing language agents through compositional constraint validation in complex, real-world planning scenarios. Project Page: https://www.lamda.nju.edu.cn/shaojj/ChinaTravel/index.html

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChinaTravel基准，通过组合约束验证推动语言智能体在开放域旅行规划中的评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言智能体基准采用槽填充范式，仅处理预定义约束菜单，无法适应自然语言中组合性、多样性和隐式表达的用户需求。旅行规划兼具实际需求和严格约束满足挑战，现有方法缺乏对开放域交互的评估能力，亟需新基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建ChinaTravel基准，包括四部分：1）多日多景点旅行规划沙盒；2）可组合泛化的领域特定语言（DSL）用于可扩展评估；3）含1154名人类参与者多样化需求与隐式意图的开放域数据集；4）神经符号智能体分析，实现37.0%约束满足率，较纯神经模型提升10倍。
light_analysis.result: 神经符号智能体在人类查询上达37.0%约束满足率，相比纯神经模型提升10倍，但组合泛化仍面临显著挑战。基准通过细粒度分析揭示神经符号方法在旅行规划中的潜力与局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChinaTravel为语言智能体在复杂现实规划场景中推进组合约束验证提供基础，填补开放域评估空白，未来可探索更高效的组合泛化方法。

title: Quantifying Climate Change Impacts on Renewable Energy Generation: A Super-Resolution Recurrent Diffusion Model
abstract: Driven by global climate change and the ongoing energy transition, the coupling between power supply capabilities and meteorological factors has become increasingly significant. Over the long term, accurately quantifying the power generation of renewable energy under the influence of climate change is essential for the development of sustainable power systems. However, due to interdisciplinary differences in data requirements, climate data often lacks the necessary hourly resolution to capture the short-term variability and uncertainties of renewable energy resources. To address this limitation, a super-resolution recurrent diffusion model (SRDM) has been developed to enhance the temporal resolution of climate data and model the short-term uncertainty. The SRDM incorporates a pre-trained decoder and a denoising network, that generates long-term, high-resolution climate data through a recurrent coupling mechanism. The high-resolution climate data is then converted into power value using the mechanism model, enabling the simulation of wind and photovoltaic (PV) power generation on future long-term scales. Case studies were conducted in the Ejina region of Inner Mongolia, China, using fifth-generation reanalysis (ERA5) and coupled model intercomparison project (CMIP6) data under two climate pathways: SSP126 and SSP585. The results demonstrate that the SRDM outperforms existing generative models in generating super-resolution climate data. Furthermore, the research highlights the estimation biases introduced when low-resolution climate data is used for power conversion.
comment: Accepted by CSEE Journal of Power and Energy Systems in Jul. 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出超分辨率循环扩散模型(SRDM)，提升气候数据时间分辨率以量化气候变化对可再生能源发电的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 气候变化与能源转型使电力供应与气象因素耦合加深，长期量化可再生能源发电对可持续电力系统至关重要。但气候数据通常缺乏小时分辨率，无法捕捉短期变异性与不确定性，现有方法难以满足跨学科数据需求。
light_analysis.method: SRDM结合预训练解码器和去噪网络，通过循环耦合机制生成长期、高分辨率气候数据。随后将高分辨率数据经机理模型转换为电力值，模拟未来风电和光伏发电。采用ERA5和CMIP6数据，在内蒙古额济纳地区基于SSP126和SSP585路径进行案例研究。
light_analysis.result: SRDM在生成超分辨率气候数据上优于现有生成模型。研究还表明，使用低分辨率气候数据转换功率时存在显著估计偏差，凸显了高分辨率数据的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为量化气候变化对可再生能源发电的长期影响提供了新方法，有助于可持续电力系统规划。未来可拓展至其他区域或气候路径，但需关注模型的计算成本与泛化能力。

title: U-FaceBP: Uncertainty-aware Bayesian Ensemble Deep Learning for Face Video-based Blood Pressure Estimation
abstract: Blood pressure (BP) measurement is crucial for daily health assessment. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG), which extracts pulse waves from face videos captured by a camera, has the potential to enable convenient BP measurement without specialized medical devices. However, there are various uncertainties in BP estimation using rPPG, leading to limited estimation performance and reliability. In this paper, we propose U-FaceBP, an uncertainty-aware Bayesian ensemble deep learning method for face video-based BP estimation. U-FaceBP models aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties in face video-based BP estimation with a Bayesian neural network (BNN). Additionally, we design U-FaceBP as an ensemble method, estimating BP from rPPG signals, PPG signals derived from face videos, and face images using multiple BNNs. Large-scale experiments on two datasets involving 1197 subjects from diverse racial groups demonstrate that U-FaceBP outperforms state-of-the-art BP estimation methods. Furthermore, we show that the uncertainty estimates provided by U-FaceBP are informative and useful for guiding modality fusion, assessing prediction reliability, and analyzing performance across racial groups.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性感知的贝叶斯集成深度学习方法U-FaceBP，用于面部视频血压估计，并利用不确定性指导多模态融合和可靠性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 血压测量对日常健康评估至关重要，远程光电容积描记术（rPPG）可从面部视频提取脉搏波实现无创血压估计，但存在偶然和认知不确定性，导致估计性能和可靠性受限。现有方法未充分建模这些不确定性，难以提升准确性和鲁棒性。因此，需要一种能显式处理不确定性并集成多模态信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: U-FaceBP采用贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）同时建模偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。设计为集成方法，从三个模态分别使用多个BNN进行估计：rPPG信号、人脸视频导出的PPG信号、以及人脸图像。通过贝叶斯推断得到预测分布和不确定性度量，并利用不确定性加权融合多模态结果，实现更稳定可靠的血压估计。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集（共1197名不同种族受试者）上进行大规模实验，U-FaceBP在血压估计精度上优于现有最先进方法。不确定性估计被证明具有信息性：可用于指导模态融合权重、评估单次预测的可靠性，并分析不同种族群体的性能差异，从而提升模型公平性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: U-FaceBP通过不确定性感知的贝叶斯集成学习，显著提高了面部视频血压估计的性能和可靠性，为无创血压监测提供了新范式。其不确定性量化能力有助于模型调试和临床应用，尤其适应不同种族人群。未来工作可探索更高效的后验近似或扩展到其他生理参数估计任务。

title: Explainable Representation of Finite-Memory Policies for POMDPs using Decision Trees
abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are a fundamental framework for decision-making under uncertainty and partial observability. Since in general optimal policies may require infinite memory, they are hard to implement and often render most problems undecidable. Consequently, finite-memory policies are mostly considered instead. However, the algorithms for computing them are typically very complex, and so are the resulting policies. Facing the need for their explainability, we provide a representation of such policies, both (i) in an interpretable formalism and (ii) typically of smaller size, together yielding higher explainability. To that end, we combine models of Mealy machines and decision trees; the latter describing simple, stationary parts of the policies and the former describing how to switch among them. We design a translation for policies of the finite-state-controller (FSC) form from standard literature and show how our method smoothly generalizes to other variants of finite-memory policies. Further, we identify specific properties of recently used "attractor-based" policies, which allow us to construct yet simpler and smaller representations. Finally, we illustrate the higher explainability in a few case studies.
comment: Full version of the extended abstract accepted at AAMAS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出用决策树与Mealy机结合的方法，为POMDP有限记忆策略生成可解释且更简洁的表示。
light_analysis.motivation: POMDP是部分可观测不确定决策的基础框架，但最优策略通常需无限记忆，导致实现困难且大多问题不可判定。有限记忆策略虽可替代，但其计算算法复杂，所得策略也复杂，缺乏可解释性。因此需要一种既能保持策略功能又能提高可解释性的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 结合Mealy机与决策树：决策树描述策略的简单平稳部分，Mealy机描述如何在各部分间切换。为有限状态控制器形式的策略设计翻译方法，并平滑推广到其他有限记忆策略变体。特别针对最近使用的‘基于吸引子’策略，利用其特定属性构造更简单更小的表示。
light_analysis.result: 通过几个案例研究展示所提方法能够生成比原始策略更小、更易于理解的表示，从而显著提高可解释性。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但说明该方法适用于多种有限记忆策略形式，并特别优化了吸引子策略的表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过可解释表示增强POMDP有限记忆策略的透明性，有助于理解策略决策逻辑。学术上为策略解释提供了新途径，实际中可用于需可解释性的自主系统。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂策略或自动化决策树构建。

title: MeTHanol: Modularized Thinking Language Models with Intermediate Layer Thinking, Decoding and Bootstrapping Reasoning
abstract: Current research efforts are focused on enhancing the thinking and reasoning capability of large language model (LLM) by prompting, data-driven emergence and inference-time computation. In this study, we consider stimulating language model's thinking and cognitive abilities from a modular perspective, which mimics the human brain architecture. We select a specific intermediate attention layer with newly implemented language heads. We conduct dual-layer fine-tuning by annotated (query, thought, answer) samples and show that the intermediate layer can also learn to decode fluent and reasonable language tokens. A two-pass inference mechanism is designed to generate thoughts then formal responses. The entire framework is called modularized thinking language model (MeTHanol) which can enhance LLM's cognitive behaviors as indicated by Theory of Mind (ToM) and Vignette-based experiments. Case studies also show that MeTHanol can plan and self-reflect and generate human-like thoughts and answers, even on unseen and open-domain tasks. MeTHanol can also adapt to a personalized prompt and behave as the specified character. Our study holds promise for significant cognitive gains from a modular perspective. Our code, model and data are available at https://bachozean.github.io/methanol-page

light_analysis.overview: 提出模块化思维语言模型MeTHanol，通过中间层思考、解码和自举推理增强LLM的认知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究通过提示、数据驱动涌现和推理时计算提升LLM的推理能力，但缺乏从模块化角度模仿人脑架构的方法。本文旨在刺激语言模型的思维和认知能力，通过模块化视角模拟人脑结构，解决现有方法在认知行为模拟上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 选择特定的中间注意力层并实现新的语言头，使用(query, thought, answer)标注样本进行双层微调，使中间层学会解码流畅合理的语言令牌。设计两遍推理机制，先生成想法再生成正式响应，整个框架称为模块化思维语言模型(MeTHanol)。
light_analysis.result: 在Theory of Mind (ToM)和Vignette-based实验中，MeTHanol表现出增强的认知行为。案例研究表明，它能规划、自我反思，并生成类人想法和回答，即使对未见过的开放域任务也有效。还能适应个性化提示并扮演指定角色。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeTHanol从模块化角度显著提升了LLM的认知能力，代码、模型和数据已公开。该方法具有学术价值，为增强LLM的类人思维提供了新途径，未来可进一步探索更复杂的认知任务。

title: A Practice of Post-Training on Llama-3 70B with Optimal Selection of Additional Language Mixture Ratio
abstract: Large Language Models (LLM) often need to be Continual Pre-Trained (CPT) to obtain unfamiliar language skills or adapt to new domains. The huge training cost of CPT often asks for cautious choice of key hyper-parameters such as the mixture ratio of extra language or domain corpus. However, there is no systematic study that bridges the gap between the optimal mixture ratio and the actual model performance, and the gap between experimental scaling law and the actual deployment in the full model size. In this paper, we perform CPT on Llama-3 8B and 70B to enhance its Chinese ability. We study the optimal correlation between the Additional Language Mixture Ratio (ALMR) and the Learning Rate (LR) on the 8B size which directly indicates the optimal experimental setup. By thorough choice of hyper-parameter, and subsequent fine-tuning, the model capability is improved not only on the Chinese-related benchmark but also in some specific domains including math, coding, and emotional intelligence. We deploy the final 70B version of LLM on a real-life chat system which obtains satisfying performance.

light_analysis.overview: 研究Llama-3 70B持续预训练中额外语言混合比与学习率的最优选择，提升中文能力及多领域性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）常需持续预训练（CPT）以获得不熟悉的语言技能或适应新领域，但CPT的高昂训练成本要求谨慎选择关键超参数，如额外语言或领域语料的混合比。然而，现有研究缺乏系统连接最优混合比与实际模型性能，以及实验缩放律与全模型规模部署之间的鸿沟。本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 对Llama-3 8B和70B进行CPT以增强中文能力。在8B规模上研究额外语言混合比（ALMR）与学习率（LR）的最优相关性，直接指示最优实验设置。通过精细选择超参数，并进行后续微调，提升模型在中文相关基准以及数学、编程和情商等特定领域的能力。最终将70B版本部署到实际聊天系统中。
light_analysis.result: 在8B模型上通过系统研究确定了ALMR和LR的最优组合，并成功迁移到70B模型。微调后模型不仅在中文基准上表现提升，在数学、编程和情商等特定领域也有改进。70B版本部署到实际聊天系统，获得了令人满意的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种系统方法，通过优化额外语言混合比和学习率来提升LLM持续预训练的效果，并验证了从8B到70B的可扩展性。该方法有效增强了模型的中文能力及多领域性能，并成功应用于实际场景。未来可进一步探索其他超参数的影响及在更多语言上的适用性。

title: Time series classification with random convolution kernels: pooling operators and input representations matter
abstract: This article presents a new approach based on MiniRocket, called SelF-Rocket, for fast time series classification (TSC). Unlike existing approaches based on random convolution kernels, it dynamically selects the best couple of input representations and pooling operator during the training process. SelF-Rocket achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on the University of California Riverside (UCR) TSC benchmark datasets.
comment: v1: initial version, incorrect evaluation. v2: Method improved, evaluation corrected, title simplified. v3: Add acknowledgments. v4: text correction

light_analysis.overview: 提出SelF-Rocket方法，动态选择输入表示和池化算子对，提升时间序列分类准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有随机卷积核方法固定使用输入表示和池化算子，无法适应不同数据集特性，导致分类性能受限。研究旨在通过动态选择机制突破此瓶颈，提高分类准确率。
light_analysis.method: 基于MiniRocket框架，在训练过程中自动选择最优的输入表示（如原始信号、差分等）和池化算子（如均值、最大值等），构成最佳组合，无需人工调整。
light_analysis.result: 在UCR TSC基准数据集上达到最先进准确率，但摘要未提供具体数值。相比固定配置的MiniRocket等方法，SelF-Rocket显著提升分类性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出动态选择机制，验证了输入表示和池化算子对时间序列分类的重要性。研究为快速、高精度TSC提供了新方向，但可能增加训练计算开销，未来可探索更高效的搜索策略。

title: Learning to Ask: When LLM Agents Meet Unclear Instruction
abstract: Equipped with the capability to call functions, modern large language models (LLMs) can leverage external tools for addressing a range of tasks unattainable through language skills alone. However, the effective execution of these tools relies heavily not just on the advanced capabilities of LLMs but also on precise user instructions, which often cannot be ensured in the real world. To evaluate the performance of LLMs tool-use under imperfect instructions, we meticulously examine the real-world instructions queried from users, analyze the error patterns, and build a challenging tool-use benchmark called Noisy ToolBench (NoisyToolBench). We find that due to the next-token prediction training objective, LLMs tend to arbitrarily generate the missed argument, which may lead to hallucinations and risks. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework, Ask-when-Needed (AwN), which prompts LLMs to ask questions to users whenever they encounter obstacles due to unclear instructions. Moreover, to reduce the manual labor involved in user-LLM interaction and assess LLMs performance in tool utilization from both accuracy and efficiency perspectives, we design an automated evaluation tool named ToolEvaluator. Our experiments demonstrate that the AwN significantly outperforms existing frameworks for tool learning in the NoisyToolBench. We will release all related code and datasets to support future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ask-when-Needed框架，让LLM在工具使用中遇到不清晰指令时主动提问，以减少幻觉并提升任务执行准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM依赖精确用户指令才能有效使用外部工具，但现实世界中用户指令常不完善。研究表明，LLM受预训练目标影响，倾向于任意生成缺失参数，导致幻觉和风险。因此需要一种机制使LLM能在指令不清晰时主动提问，避免错误生成，同时提高工具使用的准确性和安全性。
light_analysis.method: 构建NoisyToolBench基准，模拟真实世界中不完美指令场景。提出Ask-when-Needed (AwN)框架，核心是让LLM在遇到指令歧义或缺失参数时向用户提问以获取明确信息。同时设计自动化评估工具ToolEvaluator，从准确性和效率两个维度评测模型性能。实验在NoisyToolBench上对比现有工具学习框架。
light_analysis.result: 在NoisyToolBench上，AwN框架显著优于现有工具学习方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但明确表示显著提升。ToolEvaluator能够有效评估模型在工具调用中的准确性和交互效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的AwN框架有效解决了LLM在不完美指令下工具使用的问题，通过主动提问减少幻觉。NoisyToolBench为后续研究提供了标准化测试环境。未来可探索更高效的提问策略或扩展到多轮交互场景。

title: ComboStoc: Combinatorial Stochasticity for Diffusion Generative Models
abstract: In this paper, we study an under-explored but important factor of diffusion generative models, i.e., the combinatorial complexity. Data samples are generally high-dimensional, and for various structured generation tasks, additional attributes are combined to associate with data samples. We show that the space spanned by the combination of dimensions and attributes can be insufficiently covered by existing training schemes of diffusion generative models, potentially limiting test time performance. We present a simple fix to this problem by constructing stochastic processes that fully exploit the combinatorial structures, hence the name ComboStoc. Using this simple strategy, we show that network training is significantly accelerated across diverse data modalities, including images and 3D structured shapes. Moreover, ComboStoc enables a new way of test time generation which uses asynchronous time steps for different dimensions and attributes, thus allowing for varying degrees of control over them. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Xrvitd/ComboStoc

light_analysis.overview: 提出ComboStoc方法，通过构造充分覆盖组合结构的随机过程，加速扩散生成模型训练并支持异步时间步生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散生成模型在处理高维数据时，维度与属性的组合空间可能未被现有训练方案充分覆盖，限制测试性能。这一问题在结构化生成任务中尤为关键，现有方法未能有效利用组合复杂性。
light_analysis.method: 提出ComboStoc，通过构造随机过程充分利用组合结构，简单易实现。训练时加速网络；测试时允许不同维度和属性使用异步时间步，提供灵活控制。适用于图像和3D结构形状等多种模态。
light_analysis.result: 在图像和3D结构化形状等数据模态上，网络训练显著加速；测试时能通过异步时间步实现不同程度的控制。具体数值未明确说明，但强调有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了扩散模型中组合复杂性的重要性，提供了简单有效的解决方案。学术价值在于理解组合空间覆盖对生成质量的影响，实际可用于加速训练和可控生成。未来可探索更复杂组合结构。

title: Data-Centric Foundation Models in Computational Healthcare: A Survey
abstract: The advent of foundation models (FMs) as an emerging suite of AI techniques has struck a wave of opportunities in computational healthcare. The interactive nature of these models, guided by pre-training data and human instructions, has ignited a data-centric AI paradigm that emphasizes better data characterization, quality, and scale. In healthcare AI, obtaining and processing high-quality clinical data records has been a longstanding challenge, encompassing data quantity, annotation, patient privacy, and ethics. In this survey, we investigate a wide range of data-centric approaches in the FM era (from model pre-training to inference) towards improving the healthcare workflow. We discuss key perspectives in AI security, assessment, and alignment with human values. Finally, we offer a promising outlook on FM-based analytics to enhance patient outcomes and clinical workflows in the evolving landscape of healthcare and medicine. We provide an up-to-date list of healthcare-related foundation models and datasets at https://github.com/Yunkun-Zhang/Data-Centric-FM-Healthcare.

light_analysis.overview: 综述数据为中心的基础模型在计算医疗保健中的应用，强调数据质量、规模及AI安全评估与人类价值观对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗AI中长期面临高质量临床数据获取的挑战，包括数据量、标注、隐私和伦理问题。基础模型兴起推动数据为中心AI范式，但需系统梳理从预训练到推理的改进方法以优化医疗工作流。
light_analysis.method: 调查基础模型时代从预训练到推理的广泛数据为中心方法，涵盖AI安全、评估和与人类价值观对齐等关键视角，并整理相关模型和数据集资源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但论文维护了一个实时更新的GitHub仓库，包含医疗相关基础模型和数据集列表，作为综述的资源支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 总结数据为中心方法在医疗保健AI中的关键作用，展望基础模型分析在改善患者预后和临床工作流方面的前景，但未提及具体局限性。
